body:
Hunter Biden's laptop

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9a686e11742543f2846caf168edf1d4a&_e=uSAD0ogldn6H4vAuLnnlKaGlJo_tn9Nvvh5-uEdnDCnVc7nTRFrcId0_2r4yv66ut5IfVTZ_jyS1wopzB_QdoWu1L_mhKzEBc-E_aks1iYBTpJcL6iznozWr97CP9GF6MF9ajNwiOpz_HsG_4VCTTEC70z0afz-QpCSLe-DaWnBouqQDnMz1BiN8QcBZoPBb1KAeKDuqUS2FAy5ud5JOd-MJXoiGK6jaHleJ1b2gnDmKGRO1CZKc27kDEjSiX1xb4ADwIl32Lw5uo7i9c8zi-HJFArzQhpJXeeJqRS5yxW_zuGQV-vfV05fb65GNdKWa9jN7Ia3hA4bJG3RCNhwcQHWWfBtPQiURXnmq5Fn2vPAM42yclR-kMDMcGL8HVav5R8VBqnHl9SgyPY40aqvsxSfpV-QkYH1RtEC-P9ohS6Qh9rGklyy0xsuCyuKnUVHkx7bDfeS1DN4hlhkFYj50yg%3D%3D)

Friends,

The Hunter Biden laptop story was one of the biggest October surprises in presidential history. Now, thanks to the latest revelations, it's clear Big Tech companies censored information. That's why I am as committed as ever to bringing the American people the full, unvarnished truth about Hunter Biden and his foreign business dealings.

**Democrats and the media demonized our investigation, smearing it as "Russian Disinformation."
**
We now know they were the ones peddling disinformation. The American people deserve the **TRUTH!**

| [**STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9a686e11742543f2846caf168edf1d4a&_e=uSAD0ogldn6H4vAuLnnlKaGlJo_tn9Nvvh5-uEdnDCnVc7nTRFrcId0_2r4yv66ut5IfVTZ_jyS1wopzB_QdoWu1L_mhKzEBc-E_aks1iYBTpJcL6iznozWr97CP9GF6MF9ajNwiOpz_HsG_4VCTTEC70z0afz-QpCSLe-DaWnBouqQDnMz1BiN8QcBZoPBb1KAeKDuqUS2FAy5ud5JOd-MJXoiGK6jaHleJ1b2gnDmKGRO1CZKc27kDEjSiX1xb4ADwIl32Lw5uo7i9c8zi-HJFArzQhpJXeeJqRS5yxW_zuGQV-vfV05fb65GNdKWap46CMOxhbTag6fR-vsqXQD3BbMFIQRG_Qmfe3FDj9X84uJPwfm9HyyDBrcacAn27M2-yhISsuGfR1FVA7DAV_Idtj5oS5Ctr_ZJScv01fUV0KexPnq1OA-Q1kKROpO1y1XklaZvKSs0Ci_5N5vgZfA%3D%3D)
---

Elon Musk's recent report showed the FBI was talking to social media platforms to influence information being posted on their platforms for public consumption. I'm working as hard as ever to protect and uphold your First Amendment rights.

I won't stop fighting to get to the bottom of this mess. **[Would you be willing to chip in anything you can to help Republicans hold the government accountable?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9a686e11742543f2846caf168edf1d4a&_e=uSAD0ogldn6H4vAuLnnlKaGlJo_tn9Nvvh5-uEdnDCnVc7nTRFrcId0_2r4yv66ut5IfVTZ_jyS1wopzB_QdoWu1L_mhKzEBc-E_aks1iYBTpJcL6iznozWr97CP9GF6MF9ajNwiOpz_HsG_4VCTTEC70z0afz-QpCSLe-DaWnBouqQDnMz1BiN8QcBZoPBb1KAeKDuqUS2FAy5ud5JOd-MJXoiGK6jaHleJ1b2gnDmKGRO1CZKc27kDEjSiX1xb4ADwIl32Lw5uo7i9c8zi-HJFArzQhpJXeeJqRS5yxW_zuGQV-vfV05fb65GNdKWaMyNd6lbC0pVn6Fgv1FOC1er58sWzWylUNHlax9WygfswHQoWT9XfIKOBnavJf1YU5cFXS9zb7dipo-MxvffccLI98SEBeOhaUOxIzbAPtB2rqedWfzEt-kz_yyw3X5OZxZHBcZN1dO3xlAAfWVRb-A%3D%3D)**

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Ultra-competitive race update:
body:
The first ultra-competitive election of 2023 is in six days. | | |
---
| | **In just six days, state Democrats have their the first ultra-competitive election of the year to secure a vacant state Senate seat in Virginia. Here’s why it’s so important:**
* This election is the first of several this year to decide control of the Virginia Senate.
* If we win this race, it sets Virginia Democrats up with the positive momentum they need.
* But if we lose, Democrats odds will be that much harder come November.

We’ll be honest: Republicans outraised us in every quarter of 2022, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to takeover the Virginia Senate. After losses in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania last fall, they’re fighting tooth and nail for every opportunity they can find to build power. **That’s why it’s so crucial that we start 2023 off on the right foot in Virginia – but we can’t do that without your help. Every dollar we raise right now, in these last six days, helps build our long-term strategy in the states to continue electing state Democrats across the country.** [Can you help us elect state Democrats in special elections in Virginia and beyond by chipping in $7? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PEgm3TqNjzzO8Ufx_AyDOWR_80NELvJVf7U9w8M8v_atxlTO_KiMInxnDhrfyJCiy_KPNHtbjW0zuBDWmlctNjjgvheBNvGxI5wkGOjcpaIBE33izG8KX0VUvhdIOPQEVyF4a-FQkL72wDC0olz0isPaQbCD-jiGtzyoFNg66LsuAtGFr7BAtoScQp7U5cl7FyoQ23VG6xlyYXmXnco5aSOM9jA55J_Z6E6IXP2IJqI-xdn24NE6CAPfufr4WwZ_mOYqIrREpvSjKMEwDpiI9z6FbKE7H16GKBQWX9SEM1TO1ch148eexNsB8gQFf_9EbUd2x5PlGYpPktMFKYVCkIoIBnuyyYcxNMR_ON_kiILF/3sl/5OFqCit-T42eQi10rIkT4g/h0/y2Ct1uqP079x5rj0dFLqrZyESmpU2iC0HolAWaS1wPo) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: The first ultra-competitive election of 2023 is in six days. | | | | | In just six days, state Democrats have their the first ultra-competitive election of the year to secure a vacant state Senate seat in Virginia. Here’s why it’s so important: This election is the first of several this year to decide control of the Virginia Senate. If we win this race, it sets Virginia Democrats up with the positive momentum they need. But if we lose, Democrats odds will be that much harder come November. We’ll be honest: Republicans outraised us in every quarter of 2022, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to takeover the Virginia Senate. After losses in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania last fall, they’re fighting tooth and nail for every opportunity they can find to build power. That’s why it’s so crucial that we start 2023 off on the right foot in Virginia – but we can’t do that without your help. Every dollar we raise right now, in these last six days, helps build our long-term strategy in the states to continue electing state Democrats across the country.** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | There are no off-years for state Democrats – there are state legislative elections all year round. This special election is the first of many to come – and if we win this, we’ll notch a big victory for Democrats in the first weeks of the year. Let’s win this, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Keep fighting. (McCarthy must go!)
body:
Conservatives can win this battle. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10327719?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

As soon as it became clear Republicans would regain control of the House of Representatives last November, [we began beating the drum](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e0a0fd8b9b&e=17913c7d6d) that **Kevin McCarthy must not be the next Speaker of the House. **

We knew this fight was coming and spent the better part of the last two months working behind the scenes to ensure resistance to McCarthy and the establishment was shored up among principled conservatives in the House. Hard work pays off.

As I write this, _McCarthy has lost his 6th ballot_ in his bid for Speaker thanks to a band of America First patriots who, despite being called terrorists and traitors, refuse to cave to the Washington cartel.

This is what courage looks like, but the battle is not over. The House is set to reconvene at 8pm this evening and could vote in yet one more ballot for Speaker.

My team is in close contact with many of these [21 members of Congress](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=53f7d0c047&e=17913c7d6d) and their staff and others who are leaning towards joining their ranks; encouraging them to keep up the good fight and block McCarthy until an acceptable America First candidate emerges.

We’re also monitoring and engaging the conversation on social media and batting down the usual establishment arguments made against these brave patriots fighting for an America First Speaker.
---
|
---
| **CRA’s Russ Vought on War Room Discussing the Battle for the Speakership**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c4f07b47b6&e=17913c7d6d)
---

I joined _War Room_ with Steve Bannon today to explain how the fight for the Speakership is a chance for conservatives to dismantle the establishment. That’s why the political elite are pulling out all the stops to maintain their grip on power.

I said it back in November and I'll say it again. If conservatives have the resolve to win, they can defeat McCarthy and the Washington cartel. It’s the 11th hour, we’re so close.

**Keep fighting!**
|
Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3435eaa37c&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7c21a78cf5&e=17913c7d6d)

body:
| | | **BREAKING via FiveThirtyEight: Trump’s approval rating hits its LOWEST point since he left office!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&akid=9346%2E9716520%2Erq-wUc)
_But with Trump still mounting his comeback campaign for president, we need to know where top Democrats stand:_

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | | [NO](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&akid=9346%2E9716520%2Erq-wUc)

| [YES](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&akid=9346%2E9716520%2Erq-wUc)
---

Team, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight reports that Trump’s favorability rating has just hit a new **ALL-TIME LOW** since he left office!

But that's not stopping him from running for president AGAIN -- **and we can’t take any chances: Another Trump presidency would be a _disaster_ for the nation!**

We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to find out if Democrats are ready to stop Trump's comeback -- _but we’re still 32 responses short in Pennsylvania!_ **So please, before midnight:**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | [NO](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&akid=9346%2E9716520%2Erq-wUc)
---
| [YES](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230104-LivePoll-TrumpLowestEverFavorability-Pros-sl1&akid=9346%2E9716520%2Erq-wUc)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Gaetz & Gosar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230104-3762-header&t=1&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)
You're probably hearing a bit about the chaos in the House of Representatives.
And you may be wondering why Alexandria was captured on CSPAN speaking to the likes of far-right congressmen Matt Gaetz and Paul Gosar. Here's what's happening.
After Republicans won the House majority in the midterm elections, Representative Kevin McCarthy (who previously served as House minority leader) was the _supposed_ frontrunner to be elected Speaker of the House by his Republican colleagues.
But after _six rounds of votes over two days_ , it’s become clear that Kevin McCarthy does not have the votes, and no speaker has been elected. That means Congress can’t formally convene, can’t consider other business, can’t staff committees, can’t do ANYTHING.
**We don’t know what’s going to happen next but we do know that this doesn’t bode well for life under Republican control. They can create chaos that makes it impossible to govern. In fact, for many of them that’s their goal.**[Can you contribute so we have the resources to fight back? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230104.2Zru6g&refcode=em20230104-3762-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)
So what were Gosar and Alexandria talking about?
Rep. McCarthy led many Republican defectors to believe Democrats would help put McCarthy over the edge — but that was not true.
When Gaetz and Gosar approached Alexandria on the House floor to ask about McCarthy’s claim that some Democrats might leave or vote present so McCarthy would need fewer overall votes she let them know: there are NO cracks in this Democratic coalition. And we won't be bailing out the Republicans from their own mess.
There’s going to be a lot of twists and turns over the next couple days, and we promise to keep you posted.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
We know we have a responsibility to get things done for our community even when Republicans control the levers of power. [If you are able to support us in that work, please chip in whatever you can today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230104.2Zru6g&refcode=em20230104-3762-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)
**[Donate](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230104.2Zru6g&refcode=em20230104-3762-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230104?refcode=em20230104-3762-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=5&refcode2=3762_2526796_TV_eBp&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230104-3762-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=6&akid=3762%2E2526796%2ETV_eBp)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Update on Speaker vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20230104 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20230104]
Team,
It’s Day Two of the 118th Congress, and unfortunately, we've finished a second day of voting (for a total of 12 hours now) and still don’t have a Speaker of the House.
The Republicans’ infighting started to turn up a notch, so we spent a second day without a Speaker, without being sworn in, and without being able to get on with the work of legislating.
For those of us who follow politics, it can be tempting to watch this leadership fight unfold like a sport. But it’s not good for our country. For everyday people in places like Michigan, this is yet another example that their government just doesn’t work for them.
Back in November, voters by and large rejected political extremes. It was a close election that gave Republicans just a four-seat majority in the House.
That’s the same margin that Democrats had in the last Congress. And when we had a few Democratic colleagues oppose each of our big bills (think infrastructure and CHIPS), in order to get those bills passed, it was essential to have at least five to ten Republicans who voted with us. That means those bills were ultimately negotiated to gain broad, bipartisan support .
If Republicans want to have a productive Congress, they’ll need to learn the same lesson: We can only get things done when we set aside the extreme influences in our party and work together.
I’ve said for a long time that only the Republican Party can fix what the Republican Party is going through right now, and I’m glad they’re finally having a conversation about the influence of the extreme elements of their party. And for the sake of the country, my hope is that cooler heads prevail and we can get to work.
We’ll be back at it at noon tomorrow when we head to a seventh round of voting for a new Speaker.
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 7th district in Congress, which she was elected to in 2022 after serving the former 8th district for two terms. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook and Twitter.

name: Read/Act News
subject: Milton Friedman: Why Government is the Problem
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._B_a9lTpyfNN7UVRv7A)
---
| | Dear Friend,The major social problems of the United States—deteriorating education, lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of family values, the crisis in medical care—all have one thing in common. They have all been produced by the well-intended actions of the government.

And yet, for some reason, more and more Americans look to government as the solution to their problems.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._ceEQBA)
---
| | That’s why I want you to have **[a free digital copy of Milton Friedman’s _Why Government Is the Problem._](http://trk.readactnews.)**

In this eBook, Friedman uses his humble and direct style to:
* **Analyze the continuing social and economic problems as government intervention increases in the U.S.**
* **Shed light on the government and its tilt toward special interests over citizen interests. **
* **Demonstrate how and why government is the problem.**

Friend, I really think you’ll get a lot out of this eBook. It’s a favorite among supporters of Hoover. And although some of the particulars have changed since he wrote this in 1993, I think you’ll find the situation is frighteningly similar today.

**[Please use this link to get access to your copy of _Why Government Is the Problem_ now.](http://trk.readactnews.)**
Thank you,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: [List Domain] on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159737:JqhUyvGNC:m:1:3331421248:007F01B2FC01AB069600DF61AC4479B6:r) Dear Peter, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives, but supported by many well-meaning Americans, to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue, views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159737:JqhUyvGNC:m:1:3331421248:007F01B2FC01AB069600DF61AC4479B6:r) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics, too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty, including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62159737:JqhUyvGNC:m:1:3331421248:007F01B2FC01AB069600DF61AC4479B6:r) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention, and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: How should we elect the president?

name: Kari Lake
subject: 30X IMPACT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrl8ps9esice2m20f3kocn3ks9vjgqickf8tejpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cji66ob2c9h2bs)

---

There is no explanation for Election Day other than intentional sabotage.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlsd86qelfmi3vr5kmpqh51g5oqahg0e5eij31r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cji66ob6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrlkmlgofl2fc4l11g9d7gp4e8avtiqc85pj30g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cji66ob6cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6304lhb2c93ffuepljqvjt5b4mdme4e2auu7o4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cji66ob6cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf6644va6o2uaog6gocr1fcpcape6t1868fukoi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh60o32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zugdjltfcmhmoe2gcclp00rarlml013ai0tcfsrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh60o32cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z99teslq0t1cf5esapg8589hnqpkcj9v8hpkhjdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh60o32cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Kari
subject: Take this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fc0UK8QcyKbNw%2fS2C1tpQQ&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that’s just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655770%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U3wwGMdeW%2bLLpbJgENTgVw&sysid=1)

Best,

Kari Lake

[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8kdeqetj2vq05tgqh19129hkkf721ivd9377udo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugrm6s3gs4p32dlje2o72cb3mtij2ddicdgrad36mlrr8d5h6kq64t3n69i3edpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjicopb1cr56upb4phh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5ludu3qqcv6kdam5onaltgrem60kqr9gv6ogri0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zt61l7d7cpolb1jho21of9g2rda92nnj1v43l1f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zarhutkt53a159hkfhhl215vm26dkpbai3npdkv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6q32scfa8viddjrl92e8fahkjbu4etq6p2b9nq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze7pprmqd0cec2nkv7jvidj940h813hn739o2eno_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4aqnlc2g9hjd8v82npjtjv1ufkj197rtka55kqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvrav36bo5j8c2cgpaorlgjk8klt5c66r5f7u64g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z16id24361cubbm46kgi7p57j4v4g7hhhachspng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zto3jae5mt8dpoo6m5jk7uj2mbmthk7kc9nkiac0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpblh02pm5ophnkr7g6k5u4diksv9fjt1su1nmoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---
| | | | |
* * *

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcrdt7u10pt974dr5s6c0ad5b0pa4os2dmv50of0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "RedWaveFooter")
---
House Republicans have TWO words you MUST hear right now: **THANK YOU!** Because of you, House Republicans FIRED Pelosi. None of our success would be possible without you! To recognize the HUGE part you played in this MASSIVE RED WAVE, **[we'd like you to have this EXCLUSIVE piece of House Republicans merch!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5fjlfj9qbnfpq4fmj5ofspgt7aal9niutmh5r38_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjh6eoj2cdh2bs "we'd like you to have this EXCLUSIVE piece of House Republicans merch!")**

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r)
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn't someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>")
---
| That's right, as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that's exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We're talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who's so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred 'Republican' of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street, the man who believes in NOTHING, receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won't fix it unless we demand change.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r) And that's why I'm standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp's attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you'll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin' McCarthy Speakership. If you're a "NO" Vote like I am. Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here's why it's so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment "Only Kevin" crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they're coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r) This is a fight worth having, Peter. I'd be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62162579:6UXobvGN1:m:1:3331421248:D244FC0DA24A5DEE0607FF725EA6ADFE:r)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_

|

IN 2023!")

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: January 10th will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians, as abortion rights hang on this critical state senate race. Democratic candidate, Aaron Rouse, is running against Republican candidate, Kevin Adams. All that matters about Adams: If elected he'll join 19 other Republicans, a renegade Democrat and Gov. Youngkin to make abortion illegal.
body:
5 days to this election!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te27d9974-ef45-43b1-b971-9ab95c9b7587/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In five days, Virginia could begin the process of making abortion illegal._** _**This isn't hyperbole. Very few people are talking about it, but on January 10th there's a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat, and your support right now would make a huge difference. **_ Why is this so important? Because, in 2019, riding a wave of lies about "CRT," anti-chioce zealot Glenn Youngkin was elected Governor. Also, Republicans took the state house and came within a vote of the state senate. In other words, a slender majority in the state senate is the last bulwark vs Republicans turning women into second class citizens. [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T116fd24e-36e9-43fa-b89f-271c6eba5cac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats have a 21-19 lead in the state senate, but one Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as pro-life and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion._ **_Democrats, fortunately, have abortion-rights defender Aaron Rouse running._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3541a7ef-6fcd-44f6-a9a9-9ff8d5bffb6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Rouse has experience as a Virginia Beach City Councilman for four years and name recognition as a former Virginia Tech and NFL football player. Rouse is running against Kevin Adams. All that matters about him: If elected he'll join 19 other Republicans, a renegade Democrat and Youngkin to make abortion illegal. _** _This will cause women grievous harm and, in some cases, death. Doctors fearing prosecution will refuse to see women having miscarriages and other complications, as was just reported is happening in Louisiana RIGHT NOW._ [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cad031e-4dbb-409f-ba19-c57da8413423/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, my friends.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Have questions about the House Leadership election?
body:
| | |
---
Some people online, in the news, and in conversations with me the last 24 hours have posed various questions along these lines:
* _Who will be the next Speaker?_
* _What about Jim Jordan, Bryon Donalds, Steve Scalise, <>, do you want them to be Speaker? Which person do you want to be Speaker? What if it is McCarthy can you live with that?_
* _Why are they doing this?_
* _Don’t you think this is an embarrassment to the new majority?_
* _Why have some House Freedom Caucus Members taken a stand and others have not?_

Let me unpack some of these questions in case you, too, are asking them. First, why have some but not all of the House Freedom Caucus not taken a stand for a change in leadership? The vote for Speaker of the House can be the single most risky vote for a Member of Congress to take. The first Member of Congress to vote against the “presumed speaker” is walking out on a limb and has no idea whether others will truly join or not. They have seen the kind of punishment wielded in the past to those who were willing to take this risk. Remember, Justin Amash was stripped of committee assignments and the Republican leadership campaigned heavily against Tim Hueslkamp to send a message that if a Member of Congress takes these kinds of votes, the leadership will work to vote you out of Congress. In other words, “Go along with us or get out of the way.” That makes these votes extremely risky. Before the first vote for Speaker yesterday afternoon, some inside the House Republican Conference had already advocated for stripping anyone who did not vote for McCarthy of any committee assignments. So, why are they doing this? Don’t you think this is an embarrassment to the new majority? This is not a game. It’s about the future of our country. Some of these 20 Members of Congress have been working for a year to get structural and meaningful reforms to the procedures in the House of Representatives. I personally have been in meetings with several of them who have been working on this for the last year. It is not an embarrassment. It is not chaos. It also is not fun, and it is a little painful to watch. The Republican Majority in the House could pass 100 bills this week. What is going to happen to those bills? Will they become law with Schumer controlling the Senate and Biden in the White House? You know the answer to that as well as I do. Getting Biden to sign the laws 99.5% of us in this list want signed into law is highly unlikely to happen. Getting Schumer to take up bills the House passes will also be much harder to control. For those of you who have been part of the tea party movement for the last 12 years, you know that usually the only time meaningful laws are passed are when the debt ceiling is reached or the end of the fiscal year happens (or the end of the arbitrary deadline for a continuing resolution is reached). So, it is highly unlikely that much meaningful legislation will pass into law until later this year as we get closer to the September 30 fiscal year deadline. If, however, the Republican Majority, takes a little more time right now to get this right – ensuring the People’s House functions properly so the Representatives can represent the people – they will have a major accomplishment. They can show Americans what it means to legislate and debate. They can show America they care about their voters. Changing the rules of the House to make it less dysfunctional and more functional, is one of the very few things this particular slim majority can achieve. Please take a moment to consider that. The decisions being made right now: who will be Speaker and what are procedures for the House of Representatives, that is one thing this Republican Majority can get right, and these decisions are some of the very few decisions completely within their control. I do not know who the Speaker will be. I do not have a preference on who the Speaker ultimately winds up being. I have a preference on how the House functions, the rules and procedures. I have a preference on policy – I want conservative, constitutional policy proposals to at least be considered and debated. As for the who – to the extent that the Members of Congress - especially those on the Rules Committee and in “Leadership” must abide by the Rules and not set them aside, I do care about the who. Also, I also do not want any of the 20 Members who have voted against McCarthy punished for having the courage to advocate for meaningful changes to the House of Representatives. If it winds up being McCarthy and he agrees to meaningful changes and will not punish these 20, then that is better for America. If it is not McCarthy and we get meaningful changes and grudges on both sides of this debate are set aside, that is better for America. I love this country. Like you, I want what is best for this country. Taking them to get this right (the Speaker and more importantly the Rules right) is best for our country. And, for those extremely concerned about what is best for the new Republican Majority, taking the time to get this right has the added side benefit of being good for the Republican majority. I’m sure tempers are still flaring in that Conference. I hope and pray they can take a step back to think about what is best for America and how to House of Representatives to function as it was intended to function – with robust debate in the Chamber as Members advocate and represent their constituents. The votes this week for or against the choice(s) for Speaker of the House are a vote about the courage to stand up and say, “We have to change the status quo in Washington, DC.” It is about being willing to risk it all for the sake of what is good for the country. Please take the time first to pray for our country, and for all the Members of the House – especially those in the Republican Conference to have wisdom and discernment. Then please, continue to make the calls to thank those 20 who have voted for a change in leadership. Please call your own representative and tell your representative to vote for a change in the status quo. Finally, if you have not read [the document the House Freedom Caucus wrote](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) about how Congress functions (or does not function as the case may be), consider taking time to read it. In liberty, Jenny Beth

name: Becca Balint
subject: What happened in the House yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
MAGA Republicans already wield the power to shut down government processes | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56910586/386368440/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzljYjVmZS0wYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpCxyIBRNgPW7sjIFC7OH4bUi7rzxSEvPnacKkQOVYM=&emci=b1148b2f-088d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=279cb5fe-0b8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Yesterday, my staff, my family, and I gathered on Capitol Hill for what was supposed to be my swearing-in ceremony. I know many of you waited eagerly for the livestream to get to the good part. Instead, what we got was chaos and calamity. MAGA Republicans spent the afternoon fighting over who should lead their party. Ultimately, they rejected Kevin McCarthy as their Speaker in three different floor votes. This is the first time in 100 years that a Speaker election required more than one floor vote. Members can’t be sworn in or begin working on legislation until the GOP agrees on a Speaker – something they have had months and months and months to decide on. Something else I learned is that our staff cannot be paid, access their emails, or get their badges until we are all sworn in. **_The GOP is quite literally making governing impossible. _** **If the GOP can’t even agree on who should be their next Speaker, how can they effectively govern for the American people? I’m taking yesterday as a sign that we need to show voters that Democrats are united – and start building a nationwide movement to take back the House in 2024.[Can you pitch in a donation of any amount to help us capitalize on this moment and build momentum towards a Democratic majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56910587/386368441/1869993778?refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzljYjVmZS0wYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpCxyIBRNgPW7sjIFC7OH4bUi7rzxSEvPnacKkQOVYM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56910588/386368442/1869993778?express_lane=true&refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzljYjVmZS0wYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpCxyIBRNgPW7sjIFC7OH4bUi7rzxSEvPnacKkQOVYM=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56910589/386368443/1869993778?express_lane=true&refcode=E19941-20230104-SwearingInVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzljYjVmZS0wYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpCxyIBRNgPW7sjIFC7OH4bUi7rzxSEvPnacKkQOVYM=)**

With more extreme members of the Republican Party already wielding the power to shut down government processes and stall work, we should all be concerned. If yesterday was any indication of what’s to come, then we have our work cut out for us – and all of us need to roll up our sleeves and get working towards securing a Democratic Congress in 2024.
More soon. Thanks for sticking with me!

clean_body: MAGA Republicans already wield the power to shut down government processes | | Peter, Yesterday, my staff, my family, and I gathered on Capitol Hill for what was supposed to be my swearing-in ceremony. I know many of you waited eagerly for the livestream to get to the good part. Instead, what we got was chaos and calamity. MAGA Republicans spent the afternoon fighting over who should lead their party. Ultimately, they rejected Kevin McCarthy as their Speaker in three different floor votes. This is the first time in 100 years that a Speaker election required more than one floor vote. Members can’t be sworn in or begin working on legislation until the GOP agrees on a Speaker – something they have had months and months and months to decide on. Something else I learned is that our staff cannot be paid, access their emails, or get their badges until we are all sworn in. The GOP is quite literally making governing impossible. If the GOP can’t even agree on who should be their next Speaker, how can they effectively govern for the American people? I’m taking yesterday as a sign that we need to show voters that Democrats are united – and start building a nationwide movement to take back the House in 2024.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With more extreme members of the Republican Party already wielding the power to shut down government processes and stall work, we should all be concerned. If yesterday was any indication of what’s to come, then we have our work cut out for us – and all of us need to roll up our sleeves and get working towards securing a Democratic Congress in 2024. More soon. Thanks for sticking with me! Becca Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Friend, just like it did in November, Nevada could very well decide Senate control again in 2024 — so we need to help my friend, Senator Jacky Rosen, keep her must-win seat blue.
After Mitch McConnell and his allies poured over $55 million into Nevada this past cycle, it became one of the most expensive Senate races in the entire country — and we already know the GOP is gearing up to flood this battleground state with whatever it takes to defeat Jacky next year.
**That's why she needs our help to build up enough resources to fight back against the GOP's massive spending. I promised Jacky that this team could raise $25,000 by midnight to help her hit the ground running, so please, friend: [Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more now — split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's — to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56910744/386369100/920832744?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3846-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmUwNWY2OS0wYzhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyBsSCQnxgJtTTfu6Nd2JLjWTWYC-YI8z0pDRIqKdgM=)**

Jacky has a fierce voice that we just cannot afford to lose in the Senate, not with so much at stake — from our reproductive freedom to our right to vote.**But in a battleground state like Nevada, each and every dollar will make a difference, which is why your early investment is so important.**

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45638cc1616e453bb016b34d23b2a1cf&_e=emvFmlJ4aDJyJ9H4DQ7YTdWUSz3rgoKtScEEfC81M0mJyZwAjDLn4FzE63PkTJogCMWJjO9pxC0xF6z7mxG01bbcusu_AMu48Wg4otK5X2ErVJ88SAnPlIAusPAuHA9bEGkdJxSMjzNC7S0LgA4H0kADKK5UDr-Iy5gQe5shgAivc9GbsAs38RvpWuc3yITmNCWdLcUJkXN5B0krydEFUEvehT9UkWGO5B6nUPSR-caVdrO7rDWUjunuZF3bR14ccu9gD6ooblodbU6IexHPGlnD38FHHdOYeEWNR2ExP9Y1CgPuHrpSHYsdvrmy1Q9uuQtbq1JEyFk2FJ5WEwl1dbs3ElShyJgmwAZM_XHHheR2BgENgRkPMLrRRBS1oFa0mJ2OqwDSy3prxXym5Wlocg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45638cc1616e453bb016b34d23b2a1cf&_e=emvFmlJ4aDJyJ9H4DQ7YTdWUSz3rgoKtScEEfC81M0mJyZwAjDLn4FzE63PkTJogCMWJjO9pxC0xF6z7mxG01bbcusu_AMu48Wg4otK5X2ErVJ88SAnPlIAusPAuHA9bEGkdJxSMjzNC7S0LgA4H0kADKK5UDr-Iy5gQe5shgAivc9GbsAs38RvpWuc3yITmNCWdLcUJkXN5B0krydEFUEvehT9UkWGO5B6nUPSR-cbKBHWmsFT5WRSRRKzXtk63rvXN5y6kv8DRts4f6hxGOJqtuJTuJ87Spqx2ExOl3n8dYfuYXOrBFdtYxgrYsGBDSe4v4hXPtn3IqwS2MWcH9RfPdMmEeyrdB66_fBLfAzVbWBCaEw2bJdblnXZk14w2glves9XVV8w43vs8_tLOqA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45638cc1616e453bb016b34d23b2a1cf&_e=emvFmlJ4aDJyJ9H4DQ7YTdWUSz3rgoKtScEEfC81M0mJyZwAjDLn4FzE63PkTJogCMWJjO9pxC0xF6z7mxG01bbcusu_AMu48Wg4otK5X2ErVJ88SAnPlIAusPAuHA9bEGkdJxSMjzNC7S0LgA4H0kADKK5UDr-Iy5gQe5shgAivc9GbsAs38RvpWuc3yITmNCWdLcUJkXN5B0krydEFUEvehT9UkWGO5B6nUPSR-cZOqCbwi3c-kTJG6Q7dYb7ZRBqr_7-8JZfhl44cw98kJPsGpworA0fvNzSIOWDMR7pGDLkM1UQ9UwqdLTWdAbzqg32tHuwIwIjRAUS2XsuuVS_3W7ysQMdwT-VrBMqC_DgPhMmWsXYgzUnS2VsyhciAZkgD__vFfw6FTCBuNC3qog%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91dcf232bc7e4aa3a7d244a86c861aff&_e=uRk1jANCeawLw_Se0TjEMdud16VRgNTLjcaO_lAV_Ymbyy33OYNDnlfetnJApsOWwKuwfH2zpWw1h-_WVXqZGaKjW1OvoogMfE5dkEKm8CPcTrwIFua1H2lnpfvXrhQS_LgF1Ip6k9XZdeF57zvkodo0RtAGifsm2g_WbEBLzYEok9zfD_J2QwGwG31vWD74PPU4mmG46dwAqA29QnTVVPcoy6oP8mdP_MEle6QauAIWxvbodaUib2T1KZn6z280ZNJjbRm2tQv7h6orIz1ZPWUDnX3dXulNTkqXhjvzfrN3JVQVv2_OuVc3336hwzh9aaQBw1q6-HP2WgNvyjlyl6_8jLrkidLU9vTNQfvqo4gNF8_81oK7vVaxY4zB2QH9Ibdv-sbl4TnDoMoIn3RaYg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Casey DeSantis
subject: The future of Florida is brighter than ever before
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=38c749b14c1329fd41b0a9ae470212f156114331d99fca589c97dd60a3f178db855fa22e1196916e991ef2850ee9a20ccc1458b1a916b46a30443bc35a8be42192bb24da77f8c5c244c3b744e80bc02e

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8ea10ad1559e158f49e031509f400660008219fd396009c325158b034481bcd304012919e07873da0e3e4b93bf64fcad500d4e57a69f2d8a8f7a353cb1c882c6

Peter,
Thank you for placing your faith and trust in Governor Ron DeSantis to lead our state for another term.

Under his leadership and steadfast conviction, the future of Florida is bright.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8ea10ad1559e158f49e031509f400660008219fd396009c325158b034481bcd304012919e07873da0e3e4b93bf64fcad500d4e57a69f2d8a8f7a353cb1c882c6

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8ea10ad1559e158f49e031509f400660008219fd396009c325158b034481bcd304012919e07873da0e3e4b93bf64fcad500d4e57a69f2d8a8f7a353cb1c882c6

Over the past four years, while others remained silent in the face of the woke agenda, Governor DeSantis fought and delivered for Florida.

As the Governor takes the helm of his second term, Floridians can rest assured that freedom is here to stay in the Sunshine State!

Thank you for your support and prayers... and know, our Governor has only begun to fight!

Sincerely,

Casey DeSantis

Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, Thank you for placing your faith and trust in Governor Ron DeSantis to lead our state for another term. Under his leadership and steadfast conviction, the future of Florida is bright. Over the past four years, while others remained silent in the face of the woke agenda, Governor DeSantis fought and delivered for Florida. As the Governor takes the helm of his second term, Floridians can rest assured that freedom is here to stay in the Sunshine State! Thank you for your support and prayers... and know, our Governor has only begun to fight! Sincerely, Casey DeSantis Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Kevin McCarthy must be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

**_Terrorists. Enemies. Taliban 20._**

Those are the names Kevin McCarthy's RINO allies called me and the other conservatives who held the line on six straight ballots for Speaker of the House.

_Kevin McCarthy threatened to fund an endless war of primary challenges to try and force me to back down_.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61348115:s3wB9lDBN:m:1:2365227053:0EDE95F31C7B8AD45AB97D70D0645347:r)
But I will vote all night, all week, and all month against Kevin McCarthy.

**Will you help me hold the line?**

**[Chip in today and join the fight to stop Kevin McCarthy](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61348115:s3wB9lDBN:m:1:2365227053:0EDE95F31C7B8AD45AB97D70D0645347:r).**

↳ CHIP IN TODAY ↵ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61348115:s3wB9lDBN:m:1:2365227053:0EDE95F31C7B8AD45AB97D70D0645347:r)** **McCarthy 's vote share is dropping with every ballot.**

The swamp is getting desperate.

That's because the establishment knows the opposition is growing.

Kevin McCarthy spent 14 years paving the way for the swamp's worst power grabs driving our nation 31 trillion dollars into debt and trampling on the freedoms of the American people.

_Washington is broken, and this town needs to change_.

And step one is changing the speaker, which is why I will face any threat to my career to HOLD THE LINE and vote against Kevin McCarthy for as long as it takes.

You can't drain the swamp by putting the creatures who wallowed in the much in charge.

**But I need your help.**

**[Help me hold the line against Kevin McCarthy by chipping in right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61348115:s3wB9lDBN:m:1:2365227053:0EDE95F31C7B8AD45AB97D70D0645347:r).** **[JOIN THE FIGHT TO STOP MCCARTHY

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.
