# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56917646/386397554/823540626?refcode=ea.3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM5YmQ3MC0yNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9JAqu8R8FfMs614IAskD6LMB42z8v1T1tPU1XwvMwI=&emci=ab347d78-7d8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

---
I ask for your input so often because my commitment as Governor is to serve the people, so hearing from so many of you helps keep our administration up to date with the community’s needs. **Your responses inform the work I do.**
**We need you to take this survey before 5pm on Friday, Peter.[Click here to let me know the issues that are on your mind as 2023 begins.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56917649/386397557/56110285?refcode=ea.3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM5YmQ3MC0yNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9JAqu8R8FfMs614IAskD6LMB42z8v1T1tPU1XwvMwI=&emci=ab347d78-7d8c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3539bd70-258d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks very much,
Roy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Border=20Security=20Coalition?=
subject: He's finally coming... now let's greet him!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=07bc377fac&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,It has just been announced that after FIFTY YEARS in elected office, Joe Biden will be paying a visit to our Southern Border. **Too little, too late?** Joe’s open border policies have allowed 4.5 million illegal aliens to come into our country since he took over the White House. In just two months in my town of El Paso, 209,000 illegals have been detained over the last 2 months. **TWO MONTHS!****So, when Biden comes down to visit this border, the Border Security Coalition definitely wants to give him a welcome... We want him to SEE what he has done! We want to make sure that he FULLY comprehends the crisis that he’s caused.****AND WE NEED YOU TO HELP US!**
| [SUPORT THE BORDER SECURITY COALITION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=81856bce9a&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. My parents LEGALLY immigrated here from Mexico. My husband is a Border Patrol agent who had to retire due to Biden’s insane vaccine mandates. I know this issue of the border and I’ve run for Congress to try to fix it.The establishment hates me because neither party ACTUALLY wants to fix the Border issue. It’s sad but true. We have some good politicians who do want to fix it but when you get to the establishment types... they’re blocking us at every instance.That’s what the Border Security Coalition is for. Our PAC is going to fund candidates who have a concrete plan to secure our border and **DEFEAT** those who want to continue the mass invasion.
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0ae6f1e2a3&e=fdefed58de)
---
By the time Joe Biden visits this border I want to be able to send him a huge message with our PAC. We need to raise $8,500 from this email today to hit our goal. We want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them.The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for your donation today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any candidate without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America.
| [DONATE $5.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4c8dbd8931&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f9553041fd&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $40.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6b06dd98c1&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $100](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=357ecdc171&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $500](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=893df0f1e2&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE ANYTHING](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=50406a01d8&e=fdefed58de)
---
The very existence of America depends on our success. Let’s make sure that we handle this now before it’s too late... and honestly, it really is almost too late.Sincerely,Irene Armendariz-Jackson
|

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: Republican failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56918054/386398638/-1561017647?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230105_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjc2ZjY1Yi0yODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WbAJ7BO1p8FKNWBbsMxbgFWhROemaTl7tqheEg-tKPE=) Peter, Republicans have now failed SEVEN times to elect a Speaker of the House.

This hasn’t happened in over 100 years.

I’ll be blunt: Republicans are incapable of governing. And they’re putting politics over the American people.

name: Andy Biggs
subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
We won’t get it with RINOs
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpdk0mej3hte1vt8fafgulmcdootn74dtvbq6t6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmcob5cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That’s why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ota27kiap5clage3s4kuitp67nvhlins0team0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmcob5cdh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4urqckcvfb96mntlsj37ee96av2kgi8nekin8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmcob5cdh2bs)
---
I’m up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I’m the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I’ve been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won’t allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won’t let Joe Biden and his handler’s radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won’t rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8qv2eb320nr8kjfbhbditlorhmjeba2pud9lp7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmcob5cdh2bs)**

You’re a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1esi3kfl5jvbsqmriu8jvu5d55jmd1h6379mvhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmcob5cdh2bs)
---

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeldcffjucdk84eaih0bgkv2p9uambnqsrqgdu6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1k4r30d650vt4pcc6ta54h3107ven0kc4ealbn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmcldlgdna6liu3rm49jj3kn9ek6g904p1fjl088_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk77oe480kujd72e8lk2ls25o4bdfk904d6fmfo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs28kmreg4se1j54tk4jopopelfo61n65i6snln8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhag0cenm0vblrh91qk2fn05hm0jsspntmg0243g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5uns7iclkitouto8huodrajnakalgmtr8q5mio0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6l9mihlcnpp0ckrmmmniuqe21l2nd41cj3nifgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2mgf86fp4vp0q163e2mkeooc45bai0d3bb97km0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcldjtsa6e2pr2e2hcpk1jdp9909k1lgdbs6q3i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2p36cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

subject: Speaker Vote
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=829748b1e2&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,I just voted for Jim Jordan to be Speaker of the House.

We need a Speaker who will unite Republicans on border security, energy security, debt reduction, term limits and earmarks, among other important issues. These are key issues I was elected to fight for, so I voted for a Speaker who will do the same.

Yesterday, the Freedom Caucus presented a fair deal to Kevin McCarthy that would have made him Speaker on the first vote, but he eagerly rejected it. Perhaps he will reconsider. There's nothing more that I want than a united Republican party that fights for its citizens.

The bottom line is that Washington is broken and it's destroying America -- we cannot keep doing the same thing and expect different results. That's insanity.

I will always put conservative principles, my constituents and the American people first. We have to reject the Swamp way of doing things or nothing will ever change!

[Will you stand with us to help fight the status quo in Washington? Please chip in $10, $25, $50, $100 or more now.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6562c2acdb&e=fdefed58de)

This fight is ongoing, but rest assured I will keep working hard in my next term to do what's right and try to save our country.

[Please chip in here to help us stand for conservative principles!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5578221bc7&e=fdefed58de)

Thank you and God bless!

[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ad1c1f0b60&e=fdefed58de)

name: Andy Biggs
subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
We won’t get it with RINOs
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu3gr5ms1s3e7h4567iqselkllg9mcoilamh8po8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2pj6chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That’s why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc9j15kbsctbnjbd3ku3k50ficsmrj6j9ank0m5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2pj6chh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zacsdjic45s0v67hiu5sodbauv8rbepquciriufo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2pj6chh2bs)
---
I’m up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I’m the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I’ve been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won’t allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won’t let Joe Biden and his handler’s radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won’t rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zotvqe3ujhsa1meji5cbh4ihgc4u97m1q6c0fn90_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2pj6chh2bs)**

You’re a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3k5e0bhckt47tfbb673ese9h4ndc9s6n69nspfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgm2pj6chh2bs)
---

name: Shift WA
subject: PETITION: Do not seat serial liar
body:
We here at Shift WA believe that allowing admitted liar Mr. Shavers to serve in the State House is an insult to voters across Washington State. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61348530:svaL_lDNW:m:1:2610672541:825288A70E8B2FA8CC845A8952482A68:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Democrats have a serious problem on their hands in the form of newly elected State Representative Clyde Shavers (10th LD). Informed voters - notably our readers - may remember that Shavers was exposed as a serial liar days before his election - by his own father. Perhaps the most serious of Shavers' lies proved to be making up his military experience.

**Specifically, Shavers claimed to have served as a submarine officer despite failing to complete the officer training course, and even exhibited a "disdain of enlisted service members" and a "revulsion to wear the uniform." **

Shift WA was the first media outlet to report on the story. Mainstream media outlets like the Seattle Times sat on the story of days even while voting was underway. Despite our best efforts to publicize the story, thousands of voters never knew about Shavers' lies before casting their ballots.

**In other words, the mainstream media helped cover up Democrat Shavers ' lies to see him elected to the State Legislature. **

The seriousness of Shavers' lies cannot be overstated, though the Times merely called them "exaggerations." His disgusting and dishonorable lies about his military service disqualifies him for any elected position. Due to the media's shameful lack of action, it was too late to hold him accountable before his election. **But it 's not too late for Democrats to mend public trust and not seat Shavers.**

We here at Shift WA believe that allowing admitted liar Mr. Shavers to serve in the State House is an insult to voters across Washington State. It's a slap in the face to veterans who risked their lives to protect our country.

_**[Will you sign our petition demanding Democrats do the right thing, and do not seat Shavers in the State House?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61348531:svaL_lDNW:m:1:2610672541:825288A70E8B2FA8CC845A8952482A68:r)
**_
**> >> [SIGN THE PETITION](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61348531:svaL_lDNW:m:1:2610672541:825288A70E8B2FA8CC845A8952482A68:r) <<<**
Please consider making your voice heard. Demand action against a serial liar. Hold Shavers accountable.

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

P.S. We need all the signatures we can get before start of the 2023 legislative session next week. **Will you consider forwarding this email to your family and friends?** | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61348532:svaL_lDNW:m:1:2610672541:825288A70E8B2FA8CC845A8952482A68:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14105972&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osvaL_lDNW).

subject: We're hand-delivering this petition to the White House

body:
It's your last chance to sign on.

Together with our climate partners, we've collected over **100,000** signatures. And in **5 days** , we're going to make sure Biden gets the message. **We're hand-delivering these petitions to the White House next week, and our goal is to hit 25,000 signatures by midnight.** [**_This is your very last chance to take a stand against the Willow project. Sign on now to include your name in our in-person petition delivery!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&t=3&akid=13203%2E53494%2EZUcy2w) | [SIGN NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&t=4&akid=13203%2E53494%2EZUcy2w)
---
Every single signature sends a message: We won't let ConocoPhillips unleash devastating levels of pollution and undermine our country's climate goals. We won't let them lock us into three decades of destructive drilling in sensitive Arctic ecosystems near Indigenous communities. And we won't accept anything less than Biden using his authority to shut this project down completely.
[**_The Willow project is a direct threat to our clean energy future. If you want to help prevent a fossil fuel disaster, join your fellow advocates and sign your name right now before we hand-deliver our petition to the White House._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&source=ema_2023-01-05_willow-last-chance-rally-nonsigners-nonDMV_&t=5&akid=13203%2E53494%2EZUcy2w)

Together, we'll show up with numbers that the Biden administration can't ignore.
Onward,
Team Evergreen

name: Del. Jazz Lewis
subject: Big News!
body:
Friend,

We just got some exciting news and I wanted to make sure that our team was first to know. This morning, Speaker Jones named me the Maryland House Majority Whip.

Being part of Speaker Jones’ leadership team as Caucus Chair for the last three years has been truly an honor. Together we have been able to make some tremendous progress for the state from historic funding for education and school construction to ambitious renewable energy and climate goals to critical police accountability reform .

As Majority Whip, I am excited to build upon our successes and ensure our state, and our families, remains competitive in an ever changing economy.

Next week we begin a new session of the Maryland General Assembly and for the first time in my legislative career we'll have an ally for progress in the Governor's office.

This is a critical opportunity for us and we’ve been planning an ambitious slate of legislation that will strengthen the middle class economy , ensure police accountability , empower small businesses , and make investments in our communities including the Blue Line Corridor.

But we know that there is more to do and we can’t do this alone. What issue do you think should be our priority? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-Y_28_lgxUedChc2haj9sw2]

Thank you for being part of this team. I look forward to what we can accomplish together in the new year.

In solidarity,

Jazz

By Authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=841e65b116a6458fb3998c4446d9114a&_e=ZxfMefDuau5Z-Ysl5hdMd7L8rjdHLYrZP9J41jXLNmKO92kWWVAOpDyl1rAEWo_NWMaHo5pz0Ic7UkXxg_s6P7AVBJMLTmu23brJnXPyoc7h5vMgpsDUTwcV4HU7LmsR8d2NdUDKmJ4iJYd4jE06bjHnHxw56SXEdURGjx1itnQC_U4dbzqED13umhccszMbfAkfveuC7e4GBk6W0A3q5XbOV93Sri833nblvTFCrUJTSIbNrdaCd-y9vhJjulGC-8nGdTIvwj5nhbEB0LOubNOi985UJPYAQpjJxDR6ZiWycU9orwG1FBDFyShe40r4F0awix4HBd15KF_LgufS70SEVUQC-63Bk9CKXQ1dX-B_9rQaU-wJ82XVzrks_F0FPfvsYBu-ZSoqq0TG3kOuclcChRyrJpSFhWyJ4xmTy2b1ADVH71QaOvfz-ER1KYdEpIepDUD3gv2LlrCbYJ2H_lrxQgQr1X2bgPtcW08H_6E%3D)

I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now.

Thank you for letting me serve you.

God Bless,

name: Susie Lee
subject: I can’t believe what I’m watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56919654/386404440/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWFkOGM3ZS0yZjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n8z7TxnVH4zxSpO5XSYkBDvnQ5TCwd8jWBVhceOmTHQ=)

| | Folks, House Republicans have devolved into complete disarray and have now forced 8 ballots to occur to elect a Speaker. This is the same Republican House Majority that promised Americans they would deliver for them. _Now, they can’t even deliver a leader for their own Party._ By contrast, Democrats have been united on every single vote. This is because we know Americans deserve leadership in the House immediately so we can get to work and do the job we were elected by our constituents to do. [**While the Republicans sort out their squabbles, I’m resolute in my mission to get to work for Nevada. name: Tom Fitton
subject: We Keep Winning!
body:
I hope you had a blessed Christmas, and are enjoying a wonderful holiday season. I want to let you know that many great Judicial Watch members and supporters are helping us with year-end gifts, and I am very grateful!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I have great news to share with you!
On December 28th, we settled our federal election integrity lawsuit against **New York City** after **_the city removed 441,083 ineligible voter names from the voter rolls_** and promised to take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration lists.
We filed our lawsuit under the **National Voter Registration Act** (NVRA) last July after our research showed that the city had failed to clean its voter rolls for years...in fact, we pointed out that over the previous six years only 22 names had been removed under the federal law!
This is a great victory, but we have many more challenges ahead of us in the ongoing fight to keep our elections honest.
**[Can I count on you to stand firm with us now for the cause of honest elections by making a special contribution to support our work?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

_It is the support of patriots across America that has helped_ Judicial Watch once again use the legal system and the courts to deliver _real results_ for the American people...

...results that protect the honesty of our elections, since "dirty" voter rolls are the single biggest source of voter fraud in the country.

Our historic settlement is a major victory for New York voters who will benefit from cleaner voter rolls and more honest elections.

And we are pleased that city officials moved quickly to remove more than 400,000 outdated registrations from the rolls, and we look forward to working with them under this settlement to ensure New York City maintains cleaner rolls for future elections.

But the fight for honest elections is far from over!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights.

As part of our work, we have assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who have cleaned up voter rolls in both "blue" states and "red" states across America.

Cleaning up voter rolls...and protecting honest elections...takes research, investigations, drafting complaints, conferences with counsel representing states and counties, and years of follow-up work to be sure all elements of a settlement are being fulfilled.

[This is the gritty work of litigation, which not only takes time, and expertise, but money!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

That is why we need you to stand with us again today! [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

You see, it's easy to _complain_ about voter fraud and dishonest elections...but with the support of committed citizens like you, Judicial Watch takes on the work that makes a difference, and helps eliminate voter fraud.

I urge you to give your support to Judicial Watch today. I hope we can count on you now to help us keep winning in the fight to protect the integrity of our ballots and the honesty of our elections.

And my very best wishes for a Happy New Year!

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61670&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Turning the corner into this new year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I was honored to serve as Grand Marshal of this year’s Rose Parade
#

Friends -
This year, I had the honor of serving as Grand Marshal of the 134th Rose Parade.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230105-1-15&t=1&akid=3935%2E3935704%2EP6oSXl)
The theme of this year’s parade was “turning the corner,” one that resonates with me deeply.
For the past 12 years during my recovery, I have had to turn many corners. Nobody was sure if I would ever walk or talk again, but today I’m able to do that and more. I sing, ride my bike, play my French horn—my hope has allowed me to defy all expectations anyone had of my future, including myself.
As we turn the corner into this new year, and as we commemorate the ten year anniversary of Giffords on Sunday, I hope you will join me in renewing your commitment to ending gun violence.
There’s still so much more work to be done, and we must keep moving forward this year to keep our communities safe.
Together,
Gabby
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230105-1-15&t=2&akid=3935%2E3935704%2EP6oSXl)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3935%2E3935704%2EP6oSXl) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvqs4pig4ghjfr06274mqmqpipt3368dlrb747q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmep74c5h2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**

---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0vb15vfukdg8s54ts06kdet143nmco3ciodi650_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjgmep74c5h2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.

| Team,

**Today we celebrate the inauguration of three new statewide elected officials – Governor Katie Hobbs, Secretary of State Adrian Fontes and Attorney General Kris Mayes!**

We’ve been waiting for this day for weeks, and are thrilled Arizona will have three statewide elected officials who will focus on making __Arizona a better place for all Arizonans!__

We can’t wait to see what they do over the next four years. We also know that the AZ GOP is going to throw up every potential roadblock to progress they can muster.

But today is for celebrating – and letting Gov. Hobbs, Secretary Fontes and Attorney General Mayes know they have the support of Arizonans right from the start.

## Hi D. P.,
---
| | South Carolina makes the list of states with the highest violent crime. Why? The weak laws, weak punishments and weak judges fail to uphold our criminal statues. Local leaders need to get serious about making public safety a priority - now. Violent offenses were carried out by men aged 20-29 year old, with most crimes happening at residences. Everyone is a safety officer @G4A and that is why we are starting the year off with a critical information that can save your life.

body:
I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

---
Hi Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

With the House of Representatives back under Republican control, we cannot afford to relent in our fight for reproductive freedom. **That’s why I set a goal to receive 5,000 signatures on my petition to protect reproductive rights, but it looks like I’m _still_ ****missing your signature.**

Peter, I _refuse_ to sit here and do nothing while millions of people in our nation are denied essential reproductive care. I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: **Will you add your name to my reproductive freedom petition before it locks at midnight tonight?

Here’s the best link: [https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-1122-repro-right](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923761/386409983/1636200151?code=jtk944-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=&emci=e52668a5-0c86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7186f03e-348d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for being in this fight with me.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Subject: SIGNATURE REQUESTED: Will you sign my petition?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923764/386409984/265476937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=)

**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. This is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923766/386409985/1636200151?code=jtk944-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=&emci=e52668a5-0c86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7186f03e-348d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923769/386409986/1636200151?code=jtk944-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=&emci=e52668a5-0c86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7186f03e-348d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down last summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923773/386409987/1636200151?code=jtk944-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=&emci=e52668a5-0c86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7186f03e-348d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56923774/386409988/1636200151?code=jtk944-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ZjAzZS0zNDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbG8F0hLcG_PiqZMe1fIXGJU9J-FkEQXq8tqVdsVdAY=&emci=e52668a5-0c86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7186f03e-348d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

name: Joe Shepherd, URD President
subject: We are ONE VOTE from protecting choice in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Help elect Aaron Rouse to VA State Senate District 7 | | | Peter, We’ve got big news. Former Packers Safety and current Councilman Aaron Rouse is running in a special election to represent Virginia’s 7th District in the State Senate. **If Rouse wins on Tuesday, January 10th, there will be enough votes in the State Senate to protect reproductive choice in Virginia.** Even though I’m a die-hard Chicago Bears fan, I’ll gladly put aside a football rivalry to help protect reproductive freedom in Virginia. Rouse will be choice’s champion in the Virginia Senate, and that’s why Alesio (URD Wisconsin Director) and I drove over 1,000 miles from the midwest to Virginia on New Year’s Day to help get out the vote ahead of next Tuesday’s special election. Peter – I wanted to reach out with a quick update on the Republican chaos happening here in Washington this week.

**Today is my third full day on the Hill – _but I still have not been sworn in._**

Due to infighting and dysfunction between Congressional MAGA Republicans, the House has failed – and failed, and failed, and failed, and failed, and failed – to elect a Speaker. And until we elect a Speaker, we cannot get sworn in or begin to serve our communities as you expect us to do.

**Let me be clear: The Republican Party’s recklessness and disarray are directly impacting the ability to deliver for Northeast Ohio.** My Democratic colleagues and I could not be more eager to get to work fighting for the American people, but Kevin McCarthy and his extreme MAGA Republican allies are standing in our way.

[**Peter, the GOP is placing their extreme politics over the American people – and we can’t let them get away with it. clean_body: Peter – I wanted to reach out with a quick update on the Republican chaos happening here in Washington this week. = Peter – I wanted to reach out with a quick update on the Republican chaos happening here in Washington this week. Today is my third full day on the Hill – but I still have not been sworn in. Due to infighting and dysfunction between Congressional MAGA Republicans, the House has failed – and failed, and failed, and failed, and failed, and failed – to elect a Speaker. And until we elect a Speaker, we cannot get sworn in or begin to serve our communities as you expect us to do. Let me be clear: The Republican Party’s recklessness and disarray are directly impacting the ability to deliver for Northeast Ohio. My Democratic colleagues and I could not be more eager to get to work fighting for the American people, but Kevin McCarthy and his extreme MAGA Republican allies are standing in our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
While Kevin McCarthy is not a smart man, he does have two super powers: he is shameless and he lacks integrity.
#

Peter -
I wanted to take a moment to write to you about what is happening in the House right now.
Because as much as we like to shake our heads and snicker at the Republican dysfunction, what is happening right now has real world consequences, and is, sadly, a preview of what is to come in the next Congress.
Most Americans of all parties want a functioning government that works diligently to address their needs.
But what they have gotten from Washington, D.C. Republicans are leaders who encourage obstructionism, deny election results, peddle conspiracies, and bend over backwards to placate Trump.
So when they get a little power, they expect their caucus to behave differently and they won’t.
Sadly, it will only get worse from here.
Because while Kevin McCarthy is not a smart man, he does have two super powers: he is shameless and he lacks integrity.
So if you wonder how much further he is willing to cave to the furthest fringes of his party in order to become Speaker... stick around.
And that will have real world implications.
It will have real world implications when the debt ceiling comes up again.
It will have real world implications for people who just want a government that works on issues like lowering prescription drug prices, our national security, protecting our climate and the right to vote.
We’ll see what happens over the next few days, but since I know all of you are paying attention here I wanted to send a short message about what I’m seeing.
Thanks for reading,
Ruben Gallego
* * *
[**Ruben Gallego is considering a run against Kyrsten Sinema for Senate, but knows it’s only possible with grassroots support. So if you can afford to today, please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can. It adds up when we’re all chipping in. He’ll make a decision soon, and any money raised today can go toward the Senate race if he runs.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-jan23.jskq5v&refcode=em230105-1-15&t=1&akid=243%2E734936%2E2WEy05)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Official Statement from Jameson Ellis...
body:
regarding the House Speaker elections and Dan Crenshaw's actions.

| | | |
---
**\- January 5, 2023 -

STATEMENT BY JAMESON ELLIS**
**For far too long** , we’ve stood by and watched those who were elected to represent us, **the people** , cower and bow to the demands of unelected bureaucrats and special interests. Now, **Americans are frustrated** and **feel disenfranchised** by a Federal Government that is supposed to operate in a limited jurisdiction and capacity under the **consent of the governed**.

The result of an overreaching Federal Government has led our beloved Constitutional Republic being transformed into nothing more than an oligarchy - a form of government in which power rests with a small number of people.

**We have all been endowed by our Creator** with certain inalienable rights, among which are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness... but now it seems that **the lives of American citizens** have become expendable, and we have become nothing more than pawns stuck in a sick game.

Many stood silently by as unelected bureaucrats and big government tyrants **mandated masks** and **pokes** , shut down **small businesses** , and destroyed **family incomes**.

Taxation without representation is no longer just a grievance found in the Declaration of Independence but has become a grievance **felt in the hearts of working class Americans** all over the nation.

Liberty has become an illusion and we now live in an elaborate simulation that has kept **the American people** enslaved to the machine.

It has cost us trillions of dollars and brainwashed many into unsuspectedly electing people into office that continue to violate the oath they took when they were elected.

Using crisis and threats to our national security, legislation has been passed and backdoor deals have been made by Representatives under the guise of “public safety,” resulting in the loss of Constitutional rights, liberties, and freedoms.

That is why we, **the Conservative grassroots** , have demanded that our Representatives take a stand, fight for us, and stop the practice of merely going along to get along. We simply cannot continue doing the same things over and over again and expect a different result.

It is for this reason that **I am proud to support the Twenty House Republicans** that are fighting against the Establishment/Uniparty’s choice for House Speaker, Kevin McCarthy.

Additionally, **I’m disappointed by the actions of my current Representative** , **Dan Crenshaw** , who has referred to **Chip Roy** , **Lauren Boebert** , **Byron Donalds** , **Paul Gosar** , and the other 16 Republicans challenging the Establishment as “terrorists.”

In the 2022 Texas Primaries, Dan Crenshaw was put on notice.

**In 2024, we may just have to finish the job we all started together.**

| | | _For Liberty,_
---
|
---

clean_body: regarding the House Speaker elections and Dan Crenshaw's actions. | | | | \- January 5, 2023 - STATEMENT BY JAMESON ELLIS For far too long , we’ve stood by and watched those who were elected to represent us, the people , cower and bow to the demands of unelected bureaucrats and special interests. Now, Americans are frustrated and feel disenfranchised by a Federal Government that is supposed to operate in a limited jurisdiction and capacity under the consent of the governed. The result of an overreaching Federal Government has led our beloved Constitutional Republic being transformed into nothing more than an oligarchy - a form of government in which power rests with a small number of people. We have all been endowed by our Creator with certain inalienable rights, among which are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness... but now it seems that the lives of American citizens have become expendable, and we have become nothing more than pawns stuck in a sick game. Many stood silently by as unelected bureaucrats and big government tyrants mandated masks and pokes , shut down small businesses , and destroyed family incomes. Taxation without representation is no longer just a grievance found in the Declaration of Independence but has become a grievance felt in the hearts of working class Americans all over the nation. Liberty has become an illusion and we now live in an elaborate simulation that has kept the American people enslaved to the machine. It has cost us trillions of dollars and brainwashed many into unsuspectedly electing people into office that continue to violate the oath they took when they were elected. Using crisis and threats to our national security, legislation has been passed and backdoor deals have been made by Representatives under the guise of “public safety,” resulting in the loss of Constitutional rights, liberties, and freedoms. That is why we, the Conservative grassroots , have demanded that our Representatives take a stand, fight for us, and stop the practice of merely going along to get along. We simply cannot continue doing the same things over and over again and expect a different result. It is for this reason that I am proud to support the Twenty House Republicans that are fighting against the Establishment/Uniparty’s choice for House Speaker, Kevin McCarthy. Additionally, I’m disappointed by the actions of my current Representative , Dan Crenshaw , who has referred to Chip Roy , Lauren Boebert , Byron Donalds , Paul Gosar , and the other 16 Republicans challenging the Establishment as “terrorists.” In the 2022 Texas Primaries, Dan Crenshaw was put on notice. In 2024, we may just have to finish the job we all started together. | | | For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- • • Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

subject: We're lost!
body:
Will they stick with former President Donald Trump’s vision for the future...
Liz Cheney can’t get Republican votes, so she asks Democrats to switch their party and vote for her.

With the 2022 elections in the rear-view mirror, it’s clear that there are more questions than answers about the direction of the Republican Party.

Will they stick with former President Donald Trump’s vision for the future...

So, we thought we’d bring the question to you!

subject: I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024

body:

This year, my friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto faced over $55 MILLION in GOP spending – and she won her hard-fought race to keep Nevada blue by _less than 1 percentage point._

With all eyes on Nevada, you can bet that Mitch McConnell and the GOP will flood the next election cycle with millions to defeat me, and I'm going to need every bit of grassroots support to fight back and win. **That's why we've set a $50,000 goal to kick our reelection campaign off strong.**

Democrats are facing one of the toughest Senate maps in decades next cycle – defending 23 seats, compared to just 10 for Republicans. And friend, election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot.

**There's no question that I'll be a TOP target of Republicans, so we need to start building up our resources as early as possible to counter their onslaught of attacks. That means hitting our crucial goal – but right now, we're still way behind.**
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to split $3 or more between me and Maggie Hassan? Your grassroots support will go such a long way in making sure I can defeat the GOP here in Nevada and defend our narrow Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56912619/386376432/425426034?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2176-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdmMzcwNC0xMjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0W6dvtAnu5uOqqEkGONsX64xRrwm3qjq_2kpVWYZxs=)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: What the heck is happening in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
I emailed you on Tuesday saying I would be sworn in...well, turns out, the Republicans’ inability to elect a Speaker means that didn’t happen.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15615%2E3422442%2ESJjXUh)
Hey Derek, I emailed you on Tuesday saying I would be sworn in...well, turns out, the Republicans’ inability to elect a Speaker means that didn’t happen. This is highly unusual, so let me explain what’s going on:
**To be elected Speaker of the House, a Member needs a majority of the votes**(that magic number is 218). Typically, the party in power figures out who they’ll be electing in advance, and the Speaker vote is largely ceremonial. But this year, twenty Republicans have decided to _oppose_ the presumed Speaker, Kevin McCarthy. Without their votes, McCarthy doesn’t have the majority he needs to be made Speaker.
We don’t know what is happening behind closed doors in the Republican caucus, but Kevin McCarthy’s only move at this point is to continue bringing this vote to the floor. And each time (we’ve voted on this six times already!) he fails to win the majority.
**So who is going to be Speaker of the House? The very real answer is I’m not sure!**
Here’s what I do know: **The House can’t do *anything* until we have a Speaker.** We can’t swear in Members, we can’t operate committees, we can’t vote on bills. That’s just how Congress operates. We need a Speaker of the House in order to proceed.
For the foreseeable future, I will be here in D.C., waiting for Republicans to cut the BS and elect a Speaker. It’s been 100 years since a Speaker failed to be elected after a first vote, so we’re all guessing what the next move will be.
This certainly does feel like an episode of a political TV show—I’ll be sure to keep you updated.
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14212?refcode=EMAF05_SOH_20230105_V1_F&t=2&akid=15615%2E3422442%2ESJjXUh)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15615%2E3422442%2ESJjXUh)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15615%2E3422442%2ESJjXUh).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Democratic Petition for you (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Special Counsel Jack Smith
body:
But, this doesn't mean Trump can’t be held accountable for his role in the insurrection on the capitol two years ago. | | |
---
| | We can't count on the January 6th Select Committee now that Republicans control the US House. **But here's the good news: Before the end of the previous Congress, the bipartisan committee released their report and issued criminal referrals.** So Trump could still be held accountable for his role in the insurrection almost two years ago to this day – thanks to the appointment of Special Counsel Jack Smith by Attorney General Merrick Garland. Ahead of the anniversary of the Capitol insurrection, we want to confirm that local Democrats support Special Counsel Jack Smith’s ongoing investigation into Trump’s Big Lie and possession of classified documents – that’s why we are reaching out today. clean_body: But, this doesn't mean Trump can’t be held accountable for his role in the insurrection on the capitol two years ago. | | | | | We can't count on the January 6th Select Committee now that Republicans control the US House. But here's the good news: Before the end of the previous Congress, the bipartisan committee released their report and issued criminal referrals. So Trump could still be held accountable for his role in the insurrection almost two years ago to this day – thanks to the appointment of Special Counsel Jack Smith by Attorney General Merrick Garland. Ahead of the anniversary of the Capitol insurrection, we want to confirm that local Democrats support Special Counsel Jack Smith’s ongoing investigation into Trump’s Big Lie and possession of classified documents – that’s why we are reaching out today. Thanks for signing, Team DLCC | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | |
---
I love talking directly with Democrats like you, Derek -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. **If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team.** **I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. clean_body: I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | | I love talking directly with Democrats like you, Derek -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team. I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. Chip in $7 -- or whatever you can -- to the DNC today. We’ve got to keep electing Democrats at every level who are committed to making progress, and the DNC’s work is crucial to that goal. The DNC is making historic investments in state parties, on-the-ground organizing, and protecting the right to vote. Truth be told, none of it will be possible without your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our team. Hopefully we’ll get to talk more soon -- it’d be the highlight of my week. Joe Joseph R. subject: This is unprecedented

body:
| Peter,

It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate.

I wish Republicans had won back the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you. Today I’m **[asking for your assistance.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0cb5c0a0707490db9e8594b94eb6d34&_e=KCvknjV7KjY_kqwB9n7z_FhBuMyKH7JCaYlBot3ChrX4pW8jzOU2RepAhHZUbwNTQtpVfNvu0RaxkRI0INJ4nx4L52Hfrf2E3tDlHwnYPz-m-B_59HfwYXYxBWic_KtPA-vzMA3iJ1WhtGe5Z5d6ugGumACscPBtAgn9ECLdwFQ_oa64BtZOj2m_G1hcTtOZYDuOhlL0ZO-F8n-6fLSaboIrZS3tQkEQE1ZBN7XWQP4o9UmO1u-eIpdVyMETqJIfc6kIFEyYfcJm0WbFpRbQf5cBOGZ-NJzRPbioS7uDXINdiIbrH9P3sYZql46QhlruPe4K5UT1IQZ4VuBggTFuaelQgA0nQZT2XiwZza2TLz38o48pE8rxhZJjyIzDGT7wEpfK6cyYgR250WSJXYS4A_yPgb_WPeE0DcU6i1qdhyO9y-o8U5ISZwGAy5K1JM19)** Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington.

I’ll break it down for you:

1\. **TRILLIONS in additional federal spending.** Dems don’t care how to pay for it.
2\. **Federalization of elections.** They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism.
3\. **NEW deep blue states.** This could cement a Democrat majority for generations to come.
4\. **Nuking of the Filibuster.** While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party any protection still available.

**[It’s paramount you’re on our team.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0cb5c0a0707490db9e8594b94eb6d34&_e=KCvknjV7KjY_kqwB9n7z_FhBuMyKH7JCaYlBot3ChrX4pW8jzOU2RepAhHZUbwNTQtpVfNvu0RaxkRI0INJ4nx4L52Hfrf2E3tDlHwnYPz-m-B_59HfwYXYxBWic_KtPA-vzMA3iJ1WhtGe5Z5d6ugGumACscPBtAgn9ECLdwFQ_oa64BtZOj2m_G1hcTtOZYDuOhlL0ZO-F8n-6fLSaboIrZS3tQkEQE1ZBN7XWQP4o9UmO1u-eIpdVyMETqJIfc6kIFEyYfcJm0WbFpRbQfxBjjEusf847rsY6x1F0M6hJ-W3HB8ywdhZKoOTGf48tl0nruKkYxONWjKi3sNS-f_1neXOarM8G6mZqfRP3U3j5NO_6l0tvIzcH3KUKCEnzIjeqalaaFB87mVgb5Cgyy4RWN8V93V3ezqPhyfLGmkhRDLYizVbKs9y88K5DnDBr)** Republicans only need a net gain of **_TWO_ seat to win back the Senate**, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: Donate just $5 or more to our efforts.

**Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Gift $5 or more to help win back the Senate](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0cb5c0a0707490db9e8594b94eb6d34&_e=KCvknjV7KjY_kqwB9n7z_FhBuMyKH7JCaYlBot3ChrX4pW8jzOU2RepAhHZUbwNTQtpVfNvu0RaxkRI0INJ4nx4L52Hfrf2E3tDlHwnYPz-m-B_59HfwYXYxBWic_KtPA-vzMA3iJ1WhtGe5Z5d6ugGumACscPBtAgn9ECLdwFQ_oa64BtZOj2m_G1hcTtOZYDuOhlL0ZO-F8n-6fLSaboIrZS3tQkEQE1ZBN7XWQP4o9UmO1u-eIpdVyMETqJIfc6kIFEyYfcJm0WbFpRbQf46t8pUgMP75v9GyaSYKeiAMoG7gBOuo80XWA2USkpxNqRqK9Go6sz-KNEPx9PRXNj9RGuQyCyeZQSnJNHJNRHo0-YhEkMYDZevywVh--Hv6DkU35DCGQuuaOM6H-T1hBAW8lnU3JAT6oyQQlCRCHBaRbLqyAePz_3ZfQLe9F4xK)
Status: PENDING **
Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two years than at any time since World War 2. **This rate of spending isn’t sustainable.**

And despite the thinnest Senate majority in years, Democrats think they have a mandate to implement the most radical makeover of society America has ever seen.

I’m committed to stopping them in their tracks, because I know Republicans can – and will – do better, **[but I need your help right now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0cb5c0a0707490db9e8594b94eb6d34&_e=KCvknjV7KjY_kqwB9n7z_FhBuMyKH7JCaYlBot3ChrX4pW8jzOU2RepAhHZUbwNTQtpVfNvu0RaxkRI0INJ4nx4L52Hfrf2E3tDlHwnYPz-m-B_59HfwYXYxBWic_KtPA-vzMA3iJ1WhtGe5Z5d6ugGumACscPBtAgn9ECLdwFQ_oa64BtZOj2m_G1hcTtOZYDuOhlL0ZO-F8n-6fLSaboIrZS3tQkEQE1ZBN7XWQP4o9UmO1u-eIpdVyMETqJIfc6kIFEyYfcJm0WbFpRbQfyNhrCmFZR7C4ncasBMb7YpKUt7q4aavFA9IIz6kf-wabH2U1yoluAMOtf5KTMs80MmBpZn0gUDGdXaBW1qicnEJkM3OzGY_dyLUCBe3AwpaxDcwr6d8gpVXwrL2GXBld0Pd_gQgamFrI4SWv-2GXj5Qjy4f20RggnSPh02BiVgG)**

**Request for dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Gift $5 or more to help win back the Senate](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0cb5c0a0707490db9e8594b94eb6d34&_e=KCvknjV7KjY_kqwB9n7z_FhBuMyKH7JCaYlBot3ChrX4pW8jzOU2RepAhHZUbwNTQtpVfNvu0RaxkRI0INJ4nx4L52Hfrf2E3tDlHwnYPz-m-B_59HfwYXYxBWic_KtPA-vzMA3iJ1WhtGe5Z5d6ugGumACscPBtAgn9ECLdwFQ_oa64BtZOj2m_G1hcTtOZYDuOhlL0ZO-F8n-6fLSaboIrZS3tQkEQE1ZBN7XWQP4o9UmO1u-eIpdVyMETqJIfc6kIFEyYfcJm0WbFpRbQf3MnZTGaD5kxylJgEfnZLvhdPXd8VYp4vQbVZdzoMQiZHgSwDJkZuMFrtMTcBfSi9Ny8cfKwqU7eIuXYQRMKsPCwFtOPsh8hwCqpCfJlUMwyxIcUi2qyNVusbmHwavtV4y6FHkYjgWR4UyZkjelTyKCvQ4DU9-Y_S0Ii607ea2ge)
Status: PENDING **

With you in this fight,

Senator Tim Scott

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decad
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z25thb69ipu8eldor4usnvsn7954qgpnuqqhsog0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1uktmcn55eqs7sdk3mp1bu294jpnpvpurcebc6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8hjlm7uhlcve33h2up3us3vjmqm2v5f206ag3ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9bs125mhei6fv41jq16o52mc9kkrt0rv0r49kh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqakgtm2k5sar2sfir69rkagamuhmosbq9tnkq2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4m5ovl8qfl9phq2a0c77nu49sge8of1uskd9vi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0jrrk7qpek16vdbctdn29pdb571g96rhpeca2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhueicht8q5u2gsg5m1n3r8o9be51t2ljso0880_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj1pve80jpqsfqn6gv3e63ovqm482p46eo3k5r8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimcoj7clh2bs)
---

body:

I’ll be blunt: Republicans are incapable of governing. And they’re putting politics over the American people.

But if Democrats stick together in this historic moment, we have an opportunity to show how powerful we are.

body:

---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=3eeeea57fcad4516a8ba57e7250dddca&_e=BT3a2FgN5YOOPvyEol-q7PHF8vBiD1lJHhhpEuhrVCLYciYWudFhMjh8lbVTS5eeFuY2BDJ2iGY8D1t7iIOnDqx1oPYcvXRC3RRSyYLnO2fcvGo7AHh-wfze0BGO_Vx-LGDJWEnN_d6zttejOWIk0pyizYkUiVG5Pf3ZPF1QnWZwn9J0qeK_XdKxHHFO7md5zOb13w6r-txABtTjALxhVS7xEa74rmzBDJeUs6vaclBJSjVNdiZpXL70ctDzRZSehx4zl1z7sx5sStiL6MoYXoJB0Q1p19MiUS5s_TMm0dWrxAVlgJBXakgY8fdct2OzIrgvxlyygbKeJffv_58Ya8S7QaSg2UTQpZ2Bv21TngqWLdfi09wQFJHcghsO8a6v1l_c7OEcdG7R86_MMBgDoBLZEANa0T3Ux2aeDiBE12Y%3D)
---
Peter, The new Congress has just begun and I’m ready to get to work as Alabama’s Senator.
---
[**Help me serve YOU!**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=3eeeea57fcad4516a8ba57e7250dddca&_e=BT3a2FgN5YOOPvyEol-q7PHF8vBiD1lJHhhpEuhrVCLYciYWudFhMjh8lbVTS5eeFuY2BDJ2iGY8D1t7iIOnDqx1oPYcvXRC3RRSyYLnO2fcvGo7AHh-wfze0BGO_Vx-LGDJWEnN_d6zttejOWIk0pyizYkUiVG5Pf3ZPF1QnWZwn9J0qeK_XdKxHHFO7md5zOb13w6r-txABtTjALxhVS7xEa74rmzBDJeUs6vaclBJSjVNdiZpXL70ctDzRZSehx4zl1z7sx5sStiL6MoYXnN7Y1MtnFekZ9hNoGGs3fJpaAbUuK-LbT63txorRBb8KgsVPVrCL11qWOZYFCp1JqqcVKFvtYXinLkOHgHvN-is5G2FMxa1DrYoU0h-bLOEMAfhCdOXWbNtT8-zjTlP68J-IYUTitp1AUI4hdNsgbg%3D)
---
Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer have led our country down the wrong path. They’ve ignored our values and our needs. [**We have an opportunity to make things right**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=3eeeea57fcad4516a8ba57e7250dddca&_e=BT3a2FgN5YOOPvyEol-q7PHF8vBiD1lJHhhpEuhrVCLYciYWudFhMjh8lbVTS5eeFuY2BDJ2iGY8D1t7iIOnDqx1oPYcvXRC3RRSyYLnO2fcvGo7AHh-wfze0BGO_Vx-LGDJWEnN_d6zttejOWIk0pyizYkUiVG5Pf3ZPF1QnWZwn9J0qeK_XdKxHHFO7md5zOb13w6r-txABtTjALxhVS7xEa74rmzBDJeUs6vaclBJSjVNdiZpXL70ctDzRZSehx4zl1z7sx5sStiL6MoYXoiBwwXtx-XUDUg50cTpCCOMCcGOlE33rvePGjLfYbxPFYv0c9A0ZwjDxbG2ayJykOh5oB2bTQJ8byvjx-hKckckH_fXpjLdqG5n3RNpG_znXljJ4-rNxiXlq7fgI5so3Rf-HFGN4ttMk5zSJB5013s%3D), but I need to hear from you. **[What should be my top priority as I serve you in the Senate? >>>](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=3eeeea57fcad4516a8ba57e7250dddca&_e=BT3a2FgN5YOOPvyEol-q7PHF8vBiD1lJHhhpEuhrVCLYciYWudFhMjh8lbVTS5eeFuY2BDJ2iGY8D1t7iIOnDqx1oPYcvXRC3RRSyYLnO2fcvGo7AHh-wfze0BGO_Vx-LGDJWEnN_d6zttejOWIk0pyizYkUiVG5Pf3ZPF1QnWZwn9J0qeK_XdKxHHFO7md5zOb13w6r-txABtTjALxhVS7xEa74rmzBDJeUs6vaclBJSjVNdiZpXL70ctDzRZSehx4zl1z7sx5sStiL6MoYXqJ2OwaYbVJk0R0drIJwjZqBt8cK6so1h_Da6RLA8sgjMrLqeq2rKegNSaIXEAviF823YDi-emMI0cOFa7LB7OMI4xKu0laG2FDoQvuUFYyfzhV8hxqn5iAhkIxcrL4XmoKd32msZln0kCpP5tB_36o%3D)** Serving Alabamians like you is a true honor and a tremendous responsibility. I will never back down in this fight for our values, our state, and our country. Thank you for the opportunity to serve. Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt

name: Charles Booker
subject: Chaos in the Nation's Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Extremist politicians ran on chaos -- and now they’re delivering it.

Despite the months they had to prepare, the party that now holds the
majority in the House of Representatives have failed to coalesce around a
Speaker for the first time in more than 100 years. Where there was once
real policy debates, there is now corruption and complete chaos.

As we kick off 2023, the current speaker election in DC is yet another
reminder of how important it is for us to stay in the work and forge
ahead. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18859?t=1001&akid=2870%2E346206%2E4A8uch ]If you’re able, please consider making a contribution to help us
close out the campaign and prepare for the next chapter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18859?t=1002&akid=2870%2E346206%2E4A8uch ]CHIP IN →

Even though we were not successful on Election Day, the work continues,
and we must not give in to their agenda.

Charles

name: Jake Evans
subject: Fight the Culture War and WIN!
body:
Friends, If you had to name one thing worth fighting for, what would it be? We believe that the answer should be our future--our youth. Here
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.trailblazerising.org/so/09OL-2qve/c?w=RuBg52Zu1QFPnOvi92NKMUcaZS_4a9LOJyBkMPPkXYg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJhaWxibGF6ZXJpc2luZy5vcmcvc28vMDlPTC0ycXZlP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYTEzMDFhZGQtYmU4ZC00YmJhLWExY2UtMTZjZDBhZjYyNjFmIn0)_**

---
| | | | | Friends,

If you had to name one thing worth fighting for, what would it be? We believe that the answer should be our future--our youth. Here at Trailblazer Rising, we are laser-focused on helping young conservatives learn to fight for the future of our culture.

We believe that every young person has an important voice, and that their passion and commitment, when directed in the right way can help lead to positive change. That’s why Trailblazer Rising (TBR) is here to teach young people how to make a difference and reclaim our culture from the radical left.

We know that this is a battle that won’t be easy. But with your help and guidance, we can make sure that young people have the knowledge and courage they need to rise up and fight the culture war!

So join us today and Trailblazer Rising as we work towards a more positive future!

Very truly yours,
---
---
Jake EvansFounder & Chairman at Trailblazer Rising Inc

name: Jeffries v. McCarthy (via UTS)
subject: waiting on Peter's response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
we’re sick of this MAGA madness!

subject: Play with fire. You get burned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Friends — are you keeping track?

Kevin McCarthy just lost his NINTH vote tally to become Speaker of the House. And Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert are cheering on his demise.

The GOP hedged their bets on the Chaos Caucus for years, and their dysfunction is coming home to roost. It’s embarrassing how McCarthy has no control over the MAGA-right after cowing to their demands for years.

You play with fire. You get burned.

While McCarthy continues to flail, Democrats are standing together to protect our democracy from the MAGA mob. Before I get ready to vote against McCarthy for the tenth time, will you rush a contribution now to show that you’re with us?

Here's the link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-EricPersonal?refcode=E19945-20230105-SpeakerVote2-SL-GOP-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-EricPersonal?refcode=E19945-20230105-SpeakerVote2-SL-GOP-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15] .

Peter,

As Nancy Pelosi relinquishes her speaker’s gavel, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a better vision for our great country that includes:

* ...a vibrant and growing private sector economy,
* ...able-bodied people working,
* ...more domestic energy production and lower gas prices,
* ...a smaller and more accountable federal government, and
* ...restored respect around the world from allies and enemies alike!

Yes, we will still have big spenders in the White House and in charge of the U.S. Senate, but I intend to help lead the charge in the House in changing the direction of our country.

I’m sure you remember from civics class that the House of Representatives holds the federal purse strings. Republicans pledge to take measures to stop the wasteful spending that sparked the inflation crisis. **Our top priority must be to reverse the failed liberal agenda of sending government checks to able-bodied people for not working**.

Republicans will pave the way for renewed domestic energy production, even a return to energy independence, marking a sharp turn from the failed Biden/Pelosi policies.

**Perhaps most importantly,** we will bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud and corruption of the Biden Administration. **I am so energized to embark on this bold mission!**

As we prepare to take control, **[I wanted hear what YOU think the priorities for the next Congress should be.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6a9d0737b81d4925997508178fa2404b&_e=c3Ayr42mvgsLkZSU9B2_sB6JU7vlBX2dk4Ny4iHBbE5PPnqQQ9NEYuX-iEZTJfuE_dhxkvhn5Iup4KYzDwuURQJX2V9goz2GhHVp1-k8x_HHoD2FF6Hz1w7V66U0_s6YPtRglnybJUHh-n224GXsMdgVG_Ls1rmk-c6GpHVJFN2fiiLD1ZRIDnZArlihQeIvpdaMwkAVZ1pDOQALcXBoBKgasQdSvjNWJFLqxk6qoZNl-xPjXF_FyPf9pNWw6hghNbXFk6YuijJ6OVF9o2lPQQDlNvAySaAOJfp8mpWhP8uAMQRFyTCIq1iDqjAjdrsqkJvIA1VLATbm50Kfa0wstUgIzeZzN4jv9VAiLCh4qOZvQDLxeggmqVCtlpWXRPjTE-MPOXgs4_SCIOJw5Tj9faqU3ygL0Voq4xqoHDWYZ9HfTQGJbt3grZAr6G1h1kDD_wvD6aIvh7E5BGnt7u57Iw%3D%3D)** There is no doubt in my mind that every good policy we propose will come under relentless attack by Democrats and the mainstream media, so I want to be sure that as we move forward, we are doing right by trusted patriots such as yourself.

Would you mind taking a moment to**[complete the survey linked below](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6a9d0737b81d4925997508178fa2404b&_e=c3Ayr42mvgsLkZSU9B2_sB6JU7vlBX2dk4Ny4iHBbE5PPnqQQ9NEYuX-iEZTJfuE_dhxkvhn5Iup4KYzDwuURQJX2V9goz2GhHVp1-k8x_HHoD2FF6Hz1w7V66U0_s6YPtRglnybJUHh-n224GXsMdgVG_Ls1rmk-c6GpHVJFN2fiiLD1ZRIDnZArlihQeIvpdaMwkAVZ1pDOQALcXBoBKgasQdSvjNWJFLqxk6qoZNl-xPjXF_FyPf9pNWw6hghNbXFk6YuijJ6OVF9o2lPQQDlNvAySaAOJfp8mpWhP8tmUtiziRWzODTmqJ3SogQbnkicChEpRJWhsFUeFfe9QN1L0FjSzZLj1sqaE9Vb29DMY2CTB7GJKzOHlg9r96DvLgDjdTlfkBJaK7Jl6mW52agLIOrPljJBMUTwNtLUFunqU4VCD-vBgy6mY6eZ0bxUUOss4ay7fnlLk3m7CVboeg%3D%3D)** and letting me know what you think about our 2023 Congressional Priorities?
