P.S. Democrats have done immense damage to this country in the past 24 months, and we are going to be working tirelessly to clean up their mess. Our job is clear, and our vision is strong, but we want to make sure we know YOUR priorities by taking our **[2023 Congressional Survey today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6a9d0737b81d4925997508178fa2404b&_e=c3Ayr42mvgsLkZSU9B2_sB6JU7vlBX2dk4Ny4iHBbE5PPnqQQ9NEYuX-iEZTJfuE_dhxkvhn5Iup4KYzDwuURQJX2V9goz2GhHVp1-k8x_HHoD2FF6Hz1w7V66U0_s6YPtRglnybJUHh-n224GXsMdgVG_Ls1rmk-c6GpHVJFN2fiiLD1ZRIDnZArlihQeIvpdaMwkAVZ1pDOQALcXBoBKgasQdSvjNWJFLqxk6qoZNl-xPjXF_FyPf9pNWw6hghNbXFk6YuijJ6OVF9o2lPQQDlNvAySaAOJfp8mpWhP8uvfHbHc5hm1qAicTfxgk9xIVkeED_EJpg5GKjmVT82N59ScrIUFJ53H__QxKq5olQp9McH9TCun7ERS_5IZQUzkj6bdNfrqHCecktkUpcPtQJE65pqVrHbNz_Y4gcc7eCUHD32fIQovGRTA3BF3dPcFMYBGE_cB0BoRPVqAmULtQ%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: Press Release: Lashrecse Aird Condemns Senate Opponent’s Extremist Views on Abortion Ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-01-05%20at%203.26.20%20PM.png]
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Thursday, January 5, 2023
Contact : Alex Centeno, alex@lashrecseaird.com, 609-613-1857
Lashrecse Aird Condemns Senate Opponent’s Extremist Views on Abortion Ban
PETERSBURG, VA – Today former State Delegate Lashrecse Aird reaffirmed her commitment to protect reproductive health in Virginia. In response to her opponent’s recent statement to “keep an open mind” regarding Youngkin’s 15-week abortion ban, Aird reminds voters of the need to stand united against such extremism, stating:
“Let me make it plain. While Virginians have long and overwhelmingly rejected government mandates on private healthcare decisions, my opponent is selling his vote to Republicans and right-wing groups who are disconnected with the values and needs of the communities in SD-13. His extremism will cost lives, and we must remain united to prevent him from further harming Virginians."
Aird went on to say:
“My opponent thinks healthcare is a game. And he’s treating the lives of those making difficult decisions about reproductive health as pawns in his game. He doesn’t care about the people making these difficult healthcare decisions, or their circumstances.”
Aird concluded:
“Even deep red states like Kansas, Kentucky, and Montana have all rejected intrusive government mandates on reproductive healthcare. Virginians can show my opponent, and other anti-healthcare extremists, that we are capable of making our own healthcare decisions without politicians like him telling us what to do.”
Lashrecse Aird is running a people-powered campaign for Virginia Senate District 13 to champion working families, economic and racial justice, and to protect reproductive health. Unlike her opponent, Ms. Aird has stood as a brick wall against government mandates on private healthcare decisions, and will continue to do so once elected.
###
Over her three terms in the House, Lashrecse Aird earned a reputation as a courageous and indefatigable champion for social, racial, economic and environmental justice issues. The daughter of a teenage mother and young naval torpedoman, Lashrecse Aird grew up experiencing every harsh reality of income inequality, the deprivation of impoverished communities, and the hardships of relocating frequently. Her loving parents instilled in her the work ethic, perseverance and grit that are evident in every facet of Lashrecse Aird’s life. Her life experiences inform her relentless commitment to fight for Virginia’s working families today.

subject: There’s something razor-sharp inside.
body:
It’s packaged and ready to send to you...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11121/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/3593bc69caaf9093c9dc1383c786ddb8416b71eb). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11121/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/3593bc69caaf9093c9dc1383c786ddb8416b71eb?message_id=IjRjNGVjNDkwLTZmNzItMDEzYi02NDUyLTQyMDEwYTgwMDAwOUB0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).

**[We’re sending you a package and we have to warn you...](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11121/6374453/5c35cf521f5e3c5aa584ebf1ec52faaa11d09ae4/3593bc69caaf9093c9dc1383c786ddb8416b71eb)**

There’s something razor-sharp inside.

Since you were a customer with us in the past...

We’re hooking you up with a free Razor-Sharp Black Karambit Knife...

Which is a USD49 knife with a 5-star rating.

It’s packaged and ready to send to you.

Just enter the US mailing address where you would like to receive your free Razor-Sharp Black Karambit Knife:

**[Enter US Mailing Address Here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11121/6374453/5c35cf521f5e3c5aa584ebf1ec52faaa11d09ae4/3593bc69caaf9093c9dc1383c786ddb8416b71eb)**
---
|
---
---
| | |
---
Note: There are only 500 to give away so make sure you don’t
wait too long before confirming... 2.5" Black Stainless Razor-Steel Blade 5.25" Karambit Black Handle Finger-Ring Grip (...makes it impossible to drop.) Lightning-Fast Spring- Assisted Opening and Close Includes Pocket Clip [**Yes, I accept! Send my free Razor-Sharp Karambit Knife!**](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11121/6374453/5c35cf521f5e3c5aa584ebf1ec52faaa11d09ae4/3593bc69caaf9093c9dc1383c786ddb8416b71eb)
**
Once all 500 knives get claimed this giveaway will end...**

So if you want a Black Karambit Knife for free make sure to claim one ASAP.

And please be careful when it arrives. The blade is very sharp.

In Liberty,

Oli Fischer

body:
Will you share your thoughts?
Peter -

Thanks to the support of grassroots teams like this one, Derek won reelection and will head back to Congress to represent WA-06 for another term!

**But now, it 's important that Derek hears from you directly about the issues on the top of your mind as we kick off 2023. We will share the responses collected from our survey with Derek** - it's crucial we hear from you to learn more about your concerns.

There's a lot Derek wants to tackle in the new year, including getting big money out of politics, taking a meaningful step forward in the fight against climate change, and creating more economic opportunities for people.

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decad
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuura4l1noidl6gja2l2cgg0me48fa9h5tkbee5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zql7lj81b8sm1pkn44jn6qj5tr374g9llthq2kdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd64r6u1rn4tumdpsk2lcluq3tsqqp90chrmcj4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqkt9qjj6srqi2fb3p68pajrm8kl5uig1od7jle0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb539q04q1m7eq4m3nq4teku54eqdrur87eiea10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1mv27h6j1stns2r5seudtsm9okiul2vuvkm8nbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqkrl4a5p74nk8r7ej66ci0dc68oqs21vrhbhv9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0ee3t07is54l4d1m6n8ro1ahtohnac409dhllk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjimao70slh2bs)

Hey — it’s Kari Lake.

There is no explanation for Election Day other than intentional sabotage.

Knowing of the machine failures (apparently from three elections prior), Maricopa County knowingly certified a fraudulent election.

We will appeal our case, and we will keep fighting.

body:
Republicans have become the Chaos Caucus

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56952150/386424341/90958560?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.05_b1_tn_all-nd&refcode2=9f1d5ddc-498d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkNWRkYy00OThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TKOtmLo64zO_Q5a7AkNRqdVQXg-YVqYJVZY7k0O_txs=)
Hey team: By now you may have heard about the utter chaos that Republicans have caused in the House with their inability to elect a Speaker.

**Here’s what you need to know:** A member must receive a majority of votes (218 to be exact) to be elected Speaker of the House. Right now, Kevin McCarthy has lost that vote TEN times.

**Bottom line: The House can’t do __*anything*__ without a Speaker.**

**While Republicans are holding up an entire Congress with their infighting, they’re preventing the newly elected Democratic members from getting to work to deliver for American families.**

Republicans have proven once again that they do not care about working for the people who elected them, and it’s up to us to hold them accountable for their immature and careless actions. **[So please, if you're committed to keeping extremists out of Congress, will you chip in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56952153/386424342/500211535?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.05_b1_tn_all-nd&refcode2=9f1d5ddc-498d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjFkNWRkYy00OThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TKOtmLo64zO_Q5a7AkNRqdVQXg-YVqYJVZY7k0O_txs=)**

clean_body: Republicans have become the Chaos Caucus = Hey team: By now you may have heard about the utter chaos that Republicans have caused in the House with their inability to elect a Speaker. Here’s what you need to know: A member must receive a majority of votes (218 to be exact) to be elected Speaker of the House. Right now, Kevin McCarthy has lost that vote TEN times. Bottom line: The House can’t do anything without a Speaker. While Republicans are holding up an entire Congress with their infighting, they’re preventing the newly elected Democratic members from getting to work to deliver for American families. Republicans have proven once again that they do not care about working for the people who elected them, and it’s up to us to hold them accountable for their immature and careless actions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = = The work to take back the majority starts now. – Team Nikki Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. . | | =

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We knew the Republican Party was a clown car filled with corruption, cruelty, incompetence, conmen, Russian subterfuge, people more concerned about their next Fox News hit than governing. But this is truly and astonishingly absurd. Rep. Ritchie Torres has a plan to fix it.
body:
Put adults back in charge of the House
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta098e9e7-ccab-4566-979b-d1a82363f876/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_What we've witnessed on the House Floor the past few days, the Republican bedlam, isn't shocking. Yet it's still unbelievable, dangerous for democracy and we must do what we can to end this Lord of the Flies idiocy as soon as we can. _** [**_Will you join us right now in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to to Rep. Torres' fund to put adults back in charge in the House, and start dealing with real threats?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T197678bd-063b-431b-89cc-c6c2b76144d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Summary:_**_ One faction of right wing extremists is mad at another faction of RW extremists--so six failed votes and no House Speaker. We must go back to the pre-Civil War era for every other time it's taken more than two ballots, with one exception. That one—which took nine—was 100 years ago. Kevin McCarthy looks set to equal or beat it._ We knew the Republican Party was a clown car filled with corruption, cruelty, incompetence, conmen, Russian subterfuge, people more concerned about their next Fox News hit than governing. But this is truly and astonishingly absurd. _It's also dangerous for our democracy. Without a Speaker, members can't be sworn in. Therefore, we have no House of Representatives, meaning no House Intelligence Committee monitoring domestic and international threats, no Appropriations Committee working on how to fund our government so it doesn't shut down, etc. _ **_That's why Congressman Ritchie Torres—a charismatic young leader and first gay Afro Latino elected to Congress—has launched a fund to take back the House. It may take until 2024, though with such a small majority (six seats), deaths, retirements, arrests, etc could lead to its happening much sooner_. ** **As Congressman Torres said in a statement:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T330fa47f-0520-459e-82ad-c5c380e9d58e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d9bd5c1-0674-49a0-a7c0-6154eb2d393f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Watching the ridiculous, internationally embarrassing clown show in the House and knowing how small the GOP margin is, anything could happen. Including Democrats' helping anoint a different leader (this happened in state houses in Ohio & Pennsylvania the past few days). Republicans in possession of their sanity could just have enough and walk away. We're in a 100-year storm and must be ready for anything. _ [**_So, will you join us right now in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to to Rep. Torres' fund to put adults back in charge in the House, and start dealing with real threats?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12318977-5bad-4c7a-ad51-8ec8395762fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks so much for enduring these challenging times with grace. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: quick update from Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
It’s been a wild start to my time in Washington, D.C.

Hi Team, It’s been a wild start to my time in Washington, D.C. But while many of my Republican colleagues demonstrate their disinterest in governing, I want you to know that I’m staying focused on tackling the problems that the people of this district elected me to help solve. Lowering costs for regular families. Protecting basic freedoms like the right to choose and the right to vote. Taking action to stop gun violence and addressing the threat of global climate change. I was elected to work on solving the tough problems, and that’s exactly what I will focus on every single day for as long as I have the opportunity to serve. Thank you again for your support, Team. -Brittany P.S. If you’d like to help make sure I can continue serving the people of Colorado for years to come, [I’d be grateful if you’d consider making a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56916222/386392220/-373509776?refcode=email_010522_wildweek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI0ZWEzNC0yMThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hRf2TCQRKRLRGSqWgsvLTsCBkZGztDyjN-d-sB4RaWk=). I know it’s early in the year, but part of my responsibility is making sure Republicans don’t get the opportunity to flip this seat! | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56916223/386392221/-1145763526?refcode=email_010522_wildweek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI0ZWEzNC0yMThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hRf2TCQRKRLRGSqWgsvLTsCBkZGztDyjN-d-sB4RaWk=)

body:
| | |

Friend, I'll cut right to the chase: **I'm about to ask you to donate to help reelect my friend Kirsten Gillibrand to the Senate. But before I do, I want to quickly explain why your grassroots support is so important today (this will only take a minute – I promise).**
Mitch McConnell and his megadonor allies are already planning to do whatever it takes – and _spend_ whatever it takes – to flip the Senate next year. And while Democrats have to defend 23 seats to hold our narrow majority, the GOP only has to defend 10.
That means we can't take a single seat for granted – and after Republicans made historic ground in New York last November, we need to make sure Kirsten has the resources she needs to keep her must-win seat blue. **So I'm personally asking you, friend: Will you help raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to help Kirsten start her reelection campaign strong as she gears up to take on the GOP's massive fundraising war chest?**
**[Please, donate $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Kirsten's – to help defeat the GOP and defend Democrats' narrow Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56956862/386426947/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3865-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZmYzI2My00ZDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAfFVq_N3aQj5Sja8lWdx4hNK79llfT-cFaXIfPU2L8=)**
Kirsten is someone we simply cannot afford to lose in the Senate. She is relentless in her fight for the issues that matter most – from protecting and expanding voting rights to defending reproductive freedom. With our fundamental rights hanging on by a thread, we need Kirsten's voice more than ever.
**But whether or not she can win the tough reelection fight ahead of her will come down to resources, so I'm counting on you to pitch in what you can – right here, right now. Because I can tell you firsthand: These early grassroots investments couldn't be more critical.**

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj34lv653q03l2vvuasc6n69vpore3q2tor2qkt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo8oaqba77fm6qc5ntats4rq468b0farehjn19s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj2h5pb1n00e12lodrjpa7msj81he8v480srbnjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7bm753f3097obq3boo1lbbgmd9prcig9phf3tr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn5j8caf0vt2viiv5vfqpls0qo6d38hr7h9tlc4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrnkccivrd1iptue5nvd1vghmevo38o5at44j718_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8a76i5nttlr0u1ta4f1ahom81am0um1cddsjpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cjim9o34c3h2bs)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_

name: Team NPP
subject: Why people think their vote doesn’t matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
The PA GOP’s “desperate power grab” against the will of the voters.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56959339/386427860/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230105Speaker_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNzI1NzYwLTRmOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hDCv7k7M4tF5hnG1xjciuq9GRpXXS5Cgt7kmHW62kLM=)
| Fellow activist, did you see the news about **Pennsylvania’s** House Speaker Election? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56959340/386427861/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230105Speaker_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNzI1NzYwLTRmOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hDCv7k7M4tF5hnG1xjciuq9GRpXXS5Cgt7kmHW62kLM=) The Commonwealth’s voters elected a Democratic majority of 102 - 101 to the PA House of Representatives. However, due to three vacancies in safe districts for Democrats, they will not have a voting majority until special elections are held to replace the winning candidates.

In a stunning demonstration of shameless power-grabbing and anti-democratic extremism, the PA GOP planned to use this window to vote in their own Speaker **_and even delay the special elections to fill those vacancies._**

A **_compromise_** has been reached and PA’s Speaker of the House is Berks County Mark Rozzi who switched parties from Democratic to Independent, and declares he will not caucus with any political party while serving as Speaker. **[This is precisely why our work is so important. The PA GOP prove time and again how far they are willing to go to oppress voters and entrench their minority rule. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us fight back against their nonsense by expanding our majority in the electorate — and the legislature?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56959341/386427862/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230105Speaker_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNzI1NzYwLTRmOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hDCv7k7M4tF5hnG1xjciuq9GRpXXS5Cgt7kmHW62kLM=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56959342/386427863/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230105Speaker_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNzI1NzYwLTRmOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hDCv7k7M4tF5hnG1xjciuq9GRpXXS5Cgt7kmHW62kLM=) That’s not just talk, fellow activist. We’re working around the year to uplift the voices of young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other voters of color and flip even more districts, so 3 vacancies in a body of 203 legislators don’t threaten our entire legislative agenda.

Our next step is continuing to expand our staff and outreach in competitive regions like Berks County, where we can bring our expertise to even more districts in which the Commonwealth’s historically suppressed and disadvantaged communities deserve better representation. **[In our first full year of operations, as an organization that’s still growing, we made serious, lasting expansions to the electorate and got out the vote in key races. Will you donate $10 right now to help us keep growing our staff and our impact to empower the voice of Pennsylvanians in Harrisburg and clean_body: The PA GOP’s “desperate power grab” against the will of the voters. = | Fellow activist, did you see the news about Pennsylvania’s House Speaker Election? = The Commonwealth’s voters elected a Democratic majority of 102 - 101 to the PA House of Representatives. However, due to three vacancies in safe districts for Democrats, they will not have a voting majority until special elections are held to replace the winning candidates. In a stunning demonstration of shameless power-grabbing and anti-democratic extremism, the PA GOP planned to use this window to vote in their own Speaker and even delay the special elections to fill those vacancies. A compromise has been reached and PA’s Speaker of the House is Berks County Mark Rozzi who switched parties from Democratic to Independent, and declares he will not caucus with any political party while serving as Speaker. = = That’s not just talk, fellow activist. We’re working around the year to uplift the voices of young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other voters of color and flip even more districts, so 3 vacancies in a body of 203 legislators don’t threaten our entire legislative agenda. Our next step is continuing to expand our staff and outreach in competitive regions like Berks County, where we can bring our expertise to even more districts in which the Commonwealth’s historically suppressed and disadvantaged communities deserve better representation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

body:
While we wait for House Republicans to learn how to function, we wanted to take a minute to re-introduce and celebrate our newly elected WFP champions. | | | Peter, After a year of tough midterm fights, one thing hasn’t changed: **Republicans are still completely controlled by the extremists in their ranks.** Twenty MAGA Republican congressmembers held the proceedings of the new Congress hostage this week, failing to elect a new Speaker of the House on the first ballot for the first time in a hundred years — and two days and seven votes later, they _still_ haven't chosen a Speaker. Many of these same authoritarian Republican members of Congress took part in efforts to violently overturn the will of the people in the insurrection on January 6th two years ago. This week's Republican dysfunction meant all 434 members of the House of Representatives are _still_ waiting to be sworn in to office — including all of our newly elected WFP champions. But try as they might to derail our government, we’re standing strong, and we’ll be ready to go. **[While we wait for House Republicans to learn how to function, we wanted to take a minute to re-introduce and celebrate our newly elected WFP champions. Sign our card here to welcome them to Congress.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5HY5TzUYOdY-02jFuc_1eGJ8c798UmMDo3bh6St3B8i8xUM_CjzrRZf0GkO2dJKCiFIUUmOR_Y4L1XrTl50cO-uk7y_djpKh_FNHmkxRhNWNs2IbniOHsseJYdrXGKF9mYKP_OfY3Pn42aJdys-z7ugzODbM8hDmkl9iyPBqzIJGArNA5QJZE9SLQV59RIxreUX4dIYbs6hq0zx-wpjAOQI13FZO3AuHyrbdeK-gZajUXE_cjqte4Tg9f97RxIhUrm61v261ZeGz3hzJ9y7TMk/3sl/fKdPU7TVRH2z6Xgntv61Gg/h0/MO-vxUt60cuBQcXTMqzbalETga1uYzT3bK127gSY28Y)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5HY5TzUYOdY-02jFuc_1eGJ8c798UmMDo3bh6St3B8i8xUM_CjzrRZf0GkO2dJKCiFIUUmOR_Y4L1XrTl50cO-uk7y_djpKh_FNHmkxRhNWDFlkC5cVHMkilGepXKalT1iwLZPANjnxvDSj8dxVRUrSt8IwZA20Cl7QAe5LkvdM11RDZrNK-gitS3356FnRG7wjVmVsynndWLfHohA8cJMeGiVYytHiyb0fs8nxMhg_AfHQ3qD78nwDvgRZv0_H6eH5JzahvnMiEoAKPTY32eH/3sl/fKdPU7TVRH2z6Xgntv61Gg/h1/O07dgCYAo1xNErnNL2ozSIQEqSUMvq4u7adZ0OYVLkQ) **[Sign the card](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5HY5TzUYOdY-02jFuc_1eGJ8c798UmMDo3bh6St3B8i8xUM_CjzrRZf0GkO2dJKCiFIUUmOR_Y4L1XrTl50cO-uk7y_djpKh_FNHmkxRhNWMp4T4J_x_XDjbfCIs81QCmrlJW3mAu-ls7F7RXCCfiGpU71S0woVlu6GGcPGbpcE-CkZJ3-cPzyOF3yfrZrv1WGvdeyJhFmAMrp-h21NvVHL0f2170IAMhdY117BZ1Iz74oL80jaSG_n6Wwp9N1l5P2WNC9bgwk2Z8k0LixsgDH/3sl/fKdPU7TVRH2z6Xgntv61Gg/h2/NlVddDA8PUB4jMe9Om_iIs8BRI-OV-ualdsgj042mbg)** **Greg Casar** from Texas’s 35th Congressional District is bringing his experience passing policies to protect families from being separated, raising wages for thousands of workers, and successfully fighting to expand civil rights protections to Congress. **Delia Ramirez** of Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District will be the first Latina congresswoman from the Midwest, and is an accomplished social service director, community leader, and coalition builder who has dedicated her life and career to advocating for working families. **Maxwell Frost** in Florida’s 10th Congressional District will be the first Gen Z member of Congress, and is committed to ending gun violence, winning Medicare For All, transforming our racist criminal justice system, and ending the climate crisis to build a better future for us all. **Summer Lee** is a proven state legislator and dedicated organizer, activist, and advocate for social justice about to take office for Pennsylvania’s 12th Congressional District, to bring bold solutions to our biggest crises. **Becca Balint,** the next Congresswoman At-Large for the state of Vermont, has fought for working people her entire life as a parent, a public school teacher, and president of the state senate. **Jasmine Crockett** will be representing the people of Texas’s 30th Congressional District after fighting injustice as a public defender, civil rights attorney, and state representative. **[Will you join us in welcoming these champions to Congress? Sign the card to let them know you have their backs when the new 118th Congress (eventually) begins.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5HY5TzUYOdY-02jFuc_1eGJ8c798UmMDo3bh6St3B8i8xUM_CjzrRZf0GkO2dJKCiFIUUmOR_Y4L1XrTl50cO-uk7y_djpKh_FNHmkxRhNWDW5vDXFs89F2X3wAEcBcGukJRuhjzqmi1184dY6GjT6jBhgBeUKH4vu6WnfrWjiSlLF-0BZvbB-frtO0w9OIWTNs1sRGZXYghk5UAmtB7doOnMEt6s24ejV1YrOnj6f-hIAnAnB726IeCdjf8IMC873dwSv68zadiEIPbwDSGhP/3sl/fKdPU7TVRH2z6Xgntv61Gg/h3/wQEqbU8Ljq0sgsCIC4PQSzxxHZnvdQc_5FbRFCQirgk)** **[Sign the card](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5HY5TzUYOdY-02jFuc_1eGJ8c798UmMDo3bh6St3B8i8xUM_CjzrRZf0GkO2dJKCiFIUUmOR_Y4L1XrTl50cO-uk7y_djpKh_FNHmkxRhNWChi6TjO3NH8dDVXdk2b3kvoF3Nwz4rLuy7lDC2f5NZqcd-BR_bui4wojZcDIn7M1t1l3V8Gz_Eq8N7hj6L60ZXADLoDIhEIRNhTod_7oyjdAOGJ9G0uW4rlyqZEtL2kE0liQfm5Vtx89Jnziulop_sv5ere3RkOU6g9SdDrOani/3sl/fKdPU7TVRH2z6Xgntv61Gg/h4/tuoabHy8lu-KHgl6P7EtwX1dKW37Jk2E7fhnspvpP14)** Congress will be better, bolder, and more dedicated to working people with leaders like these in it, as well as all of the people-powered candidates we endorsed who won re-election last year. But while the midterms may be over, our work is not. In 2023, our WFP champions in Congress will be fighting harder than ever to:
* Protect and expand freedom and justice for everyone, including the freedom to have an abortion, the freedom to vote, racial justice, economic justice, and environmental justice.
* Pass policies that ensure that every person has what they need to thrive, like high-quality health care, affordable housing, good-paying jobs that treat you with respect, and more.
* Hold the wealthy and powerful accountable for their actions, and make sure they pay their fair share.

clean_body: While we wait for House Republicans to learn how to function, we wanted to take a minute to re-introduce and celebrate our newly elected WFP champions. | | | Peter, After a year of tough midterm fights, one thing hasn’t changed: Republicans are still completely controlled by the extremists in their ranks. Twenty MAGA Republican congressmembers held the proceedings of the new Congress hostage this week, failing to elect a new Speaker of the House on the first ballot for the first time in a hundred years — and two days and seven votes later, they still haven't chosen a Speaker. Many of these same authoritarian Republican members of Congress took part in efforts to violently overturn the will of the people in the insurrection on January 6th two years ago. This week's Republican dysfunction meant all 434 members of the House of Representatives are still waiting to be sworn in to office — including all of our newly elected WFP champions. But try as they might to derail our government, we’re standing strong, and we’ll be ready to go. Greg Casar from Texas’s 35th Congressional District is bringing his experience passing policies to protect families from being separated, raising wages for thousands of workers, and successfully fighting to expand civil rights protections to Congress. Delia Ramirez of Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District will be the first Latina congresswoman from the Midwest, and is an accomplished social service director, community leader, and coalition builder who has dedicated her life and career to advocating for working families. Maxwell Frost in Florida’s 10th Congressional District will be the first Gen Z member of Congress, and is committed to ending gun violence, winning Medicare For All, transforming our racist criminal justice system, and ending the climate crisis to build a better future for us all. Summer Lee is a proven state legislator and dedicated organizer, activist, and advocate for social justice about to take office for Pennsylvania’s 12th Congressional District, to bring bold solutions to our biggest crises. Becca Balint, the next Congresswoman At-Large for the state of Vermont, has fought for working people her entire life as a parent, a public school teacher, and president of the state senate. Jasmine Crockett will be representing the people of Texas’s 30th Congressional District after fighting injustice as a public defender, civil rights attorney, and state representative. Congress will be better, bolder, and more dedicated to working people with leaders like these in it, as well as all of the people-powered candidates we endorsed who won re-election last year. But while the midterms may be over, our work is not. In 2023, our WFP champions in Congress will be fighting harder than ever to: Protect and expand freedom and justice for everyone, including the freedom to have an abortion, the freedom to vote, racial justice, economic justice, and environmental justice. Pass policies that ensure that every person has what they need to thrive, like high-quality health care, affordable housing, good-paying jobs that treat you with respect, and more. Hold the wealthy and powerful accountable for their actions, and make sure they pay their fair share. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
We won’t get it with RINOs
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be0571daf17a4acaafc4c5c04a41678c&_e=wMifT0-jVhfQa0X3OPacKHiFeux0Da9FCmQJi-mGuw6zSEaaIk7hkkHGcUsW6znAQzuLuFMSqs2k3MPV6IF9sqKmiuMe-SgIUprhCip6GyxuZugrQZfag22n1wCDA7uGC1yvP-DUYuVffU9A_xhe7cpNdDYVMcopdBQxc7zJp7CRx4uUJW9Luvynu0_C4rESnNh7cYvT4qyDtry5VOD-FIPQ33SidBBx3VnVh4JXuBEevg6ELtDweGCMrXL9gI0GeGv7sDGJWWOtSMbseKERukKeTNdOfIAwl8nPJI8k78XdWx2cRV9zAzjdcacZrr3J)

| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That's why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be0571daf17a4acaafc4c5c04a41678c&_e=wMifT0-jVhfQa0X3OPacKHiFeux0Da9FCmQJi-mGuw6zSEaaIk7hkkHGcUsW6znAQzuLuFMSqs2k3MPV6IF9sqKmiuMe-SgIUprhCip6GyxuZugrQZfag22n1wCDA7uGC1yvP-DUYuVffU9A_xhe7cpNdDYVMcopdBQxc7zJp7CDivSnK_ePfWrh3yMkrb9FgGdsxUCExY5-kBRYrxLjLDphna4oFazLDMJbtRRa53g7Kfws-8k2oTzFR7ydN_3HdJPIdrfxgGQFr4ELNEtLhFeWt5qnb7U_QvUxc9m6Jw-o1sQehujwba4bzCbvG0Jx)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be0571daf17a4acaafc4c5c04a41678c&_e=wMifT0-jVhfQa0X3OPacKHiFeux0Da9FCmQJi-mGuw6zSEaaIk7hkkHGcUsW6znAQzuLuFMSqs2k3MPV6IF9sqKmiuMe-SgIUprhCip6GyxuZugrQZfag22n1wCDA7uGC1yvP-DUYuVffU9A_xhe7cpNdDYVMcopdBQxc7zJp7Aq1CwTWYd1wqJIheOa0Hw9a8OGljjBwF7CGu42gsz1ccSdwzsAwyU6bAqP3ICJEyGC1KzPAehIovPfi_A6Jeofw3AD1jLgKbn79cp0Z_-CIyllXUzDv-7BJcBXJfZt7mwDHOYANzr2ifmyfzRY9nt1)
---
I'm up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I'm the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I've been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won 't allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won't let Joe Biden and his handler's radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won't rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be0571daf17a4acaafc4c5c04a41678c&_e=wMifT0-jVhfQa0X3OPacKHiFeux0Da9FCmQJi-mGuw6zSEaaIk7hkkHGcUsW6znAQzuLuFMSqs2k3MPV6IF9sqKmiuMe-SgIUprhCip6GyxuZugrQZfag22n1wCDA7uGC1yvP-DUYuVffU9A_xhe7cpNdDYVMcopdBQxc7zJp7ARDeAPq-W3JocJANEMkIUWadnc7z-agfM9dIRsjfNi2Pry6GgMLzIypKrHBk2dRm7VcajhQxB-dhSlZVWPJuMUW1s2cob5oh8BZWFbTHOqJ8XTLAaVEZHJJKsAQiLvrXHNuuq5VtyBcN9pUgIk_QqT)**

You're a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e2a8e5243ed4f41acb2d9984f470c7c&_e=2mj-wVzrHGPwxwnx3rbp93Czgio1_OAHA93IMMqji03og3Qv6UgQ9haw7vELXlNXQFzcaVF83bV0r02DvEQUv_0UNiPCOBUfdJBJpfzIBkB_uHf7RQarMcE7MFgqKSzsUUtKvQG4WgJ_jM1b1s8eZdjYOgUYd262u24IyX5LWsNTCZxmwdaTvWGOkpDZU8xBzc35WPeCys_32hISo6WJFxKDWB6i-yFm-1AsUObV5tBcQhAcxTog8eJeUzbvPa7mupjC47KReHFaOE71QVmLf7TeJur1EOGpA8gdWICMd9s%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e2a8e5243ed4f41acb2d9984f470c7c&_e=2mj-wVzrHGPwxwnx3rbp93Czgio1_OAHA93IMMqji03og3Qv6UgQ9haw7vELXlNXQFzcaVF83bV0r02DvEQUv_0UNiPCOBUfdJBJpfzIBkB_uHf7RQarMcE7MFgqKSzsUUtKvQG4WgJ_jM1b1s8eZT0koUSO0gEn4KUCU68C4TpA2o7n9qH5olUR1RrTHqCZm003yCYpb3DXgRSSvk_fiDK4rRz2-b6M0kM29JY1FzbIrsw-7SljRsVdueEfmmXmD-2re4F-_2ValCGMtSc5aoRkud0MFvPa-2KgQgNnJzw%3D) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: 𝐫𝐞: Senate filibuster

body:
Peter, should we keep the filibuster?

| **ONE:** The filibuster is a Senate rule that requires a supermajority to pass legislation. _Republicans have used it to block progress on issues such as voting and civil rights!_

**TWO:** President Biden is renewing his push for an assault weapons ban... but the bill stands little chance of breaking the Senate filibuster.

**THREE:** The Senate just passed a bill protecting same-sex and interracial marriage... _after a filibuster was defeated!_

**Here’s the bottom line: The Senate filibuster rule has led to legislative gridlock.**

[**_So Peter, we need to know by midnight:
DO YOU SUPPORT ABOLISHING THE FILIBUSTER? »_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56918416/386399979/-2064944384?refcode=UD_20230105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYjMxZDJiLTJiOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8SA6RPw-wV5_rTjsOkHTKUHuG8vhx9IiUeu5IgmCUxI=&emci=ce5ae243-558c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=4bb31d2b-2b8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4584036) | **[YES »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56918418/386399988/-2064944384?refcode=UD_20230105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYjMxZDJiLTJiOGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8SA6RPw-wV5_rTjsOkHTKUHuG8vhx9IiUeu5IgmCUxI=&emci=ce5ae243-558c-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=4bb31d2b-2b8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4584036)**

clean_body: Peter, should we keep the filibuster? | ONE: The filibuster is a Senate rule that requires a supermajority to pass legislation. Republicans have used it to block progress on issues such as voting and civil rights! TWO: President Biden is renewing his push for an assault weapons ban... but the bill stands little chance of breaking the Senate filibuster. THREE: The Senate just passed a bill protecting same-sex and interracial marriage... after a filibuster was defeated! Here’s the bottom line: The Senate filibuster rule has led to legislative gridlock. | Peter, it’s clear that if we want to make progress on these important issues in President Biden’s agenda, the filibuster MUST be abolished! With our tiny majority in the Senate, we can’t leave anything up to chance. | | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

Guest Column:

** What can we expect from the new Latinos in Congress? (https://geraldocadava.substack.com/p/what-can-we-expect-from-the-new-latinos)

By Geraldo Cadava | Latinos in Depth

They’ll get sworn in tomorrow, Tuesday January 3. There will be 47 of them: 35 Democrats, 12 Republicans. That’s more Latinos in Congress than ever before—a sign that Latinos have begun to flex their political muscle, even though they’ll still make up only 10 percent of all members of Congress. We’ve heard the hype about them. We’ve seen the selfies. But how will they govern?

As an observer of Latino politics, I’m most interested in seeing whether they’ll come together in an effort to advocate for Latino issues nationally—if there is such a thing—or whether they’ll continue to see themselves as representatives of particular districts and constituents, many of whom are Latino, and many of whom are not.

The extent to which Latinos see themselves as individuals or as members of larger Latino collectives is one of the most enduring debates that Latinos have with one another. The answer, of course, is that we are always both at the same time. As we watch the Latinos in Congress begin to find their way in D.C., to carve space for themselves, and to legislate, we’ll be watching this very old dynamic playing out in real time, and on a national stage.

When I listen to the newly elected Latinos talk about what they hope to accomplish in Congress—both in the stories about them, and in the few conversations I’ve had with them—I already hear them wrestling with how they’ll walk the line between representing their particular communities and constituents, and Latinos nationally. They describe the responsibility they feel to do both. They’ve said they will stay true to their principles and not forget the people who elected them to office, at the same time that they’ve expressed excitement about heading to D.C. to become part of a larger Latino coalition. The line will be easier to walk for some than it will be for others.

Progressives like Greg Casar of Texas (age 33), Maxwell Alejandro Frost of Florida (25), Robert Garcia of California (45), and Delia Ramirez of Illinois (39), have announced their plans to fight for change. They’ll advocate for a path to citizenship for undocumented migrants, climate justice, gun control, and affordable and accessible health care. They want to push the Democratic party, and the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, to the left. They want to bring new energy to the Congressional Progressive Caucus, of which they are all members. They want to deliver change immediately, because, they say, the voters they represent are tired of waiting for it.

Silvia Foster-Frau of The Washington Post wrote about the progressive Latinos in her new article, “** New liberal Latino lawmakers are preparing to challenge the status quo (https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2023/01/02/record-latino-congress/)
.” Casar won his race by a margin of 72.6 to 27.4 percent. Frost won 59 to 39. Garcia won 68.4 to 31.6. Ramirez won 67 to 33. Their seats are in safely-Democratic districts, so they’ll be able to advocate for progressive positions more easily than Latinos in other kinds of districts; their own progressive politics and the positions that many in their district will support are one and the same.

** To Continue Reading This Article Click Here. (https://geraldocadava.substack.com/p/what-can-we-expect-from-the-new-latinos)

Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to read our updates. If you have any news to share, comments to make, or corrections for us, feel free to ** email us (mailto:info@latinos.vote)
anytime.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andy=20Biggs?=
subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
We won’t get it with RINOs | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=47742d198a&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That’s why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6eab7aaf54&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7afb7f2e99&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’m up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I’m the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I’ve been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won’t allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won’t let Joe Biden and his handler’s radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won’t rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=16d288fccf&e=fdefed58de)**

You’re a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8839e29029&e=fdefed58de)

---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7b113ad3e05a4d30904f15fd199646c2&_e=v04Sj4_e_xCSWqLuAqNLebmX10JPGaVJFAPQmHfOUMTljH7CfvNa0ftVJpD2T4CdHtEx6tcGZmZ9cyfPhZujU4ahNF4FjZa1I0i6uwKTbBcH0HCoObeCOMD078EXjELrdhDxMEFufh7U3d0bWIrzktJejlptz_5lenmezSQU-Tb-RGsbWsDlOS2CYNmRqhpkOZ4cARRyPk-c1CvByfcRI3bmw3QSQV-TAe3adkx78Nr3ao18RDi_-SZ0gGHa9BolIKtOgeh4KhhoL6Jd9q1xZKX3jqOuWRysEdUZJxBW_po%3D "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY ")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7b113ad3e05a4d30904f15fd199646c2&_e=v04Sj4_e_xCSWqLuAqNLebmX10JPGaVJFAPQmHfOUMTljH7CfvNa0ftVJpD2T4CdHtEx6tcGZmZ9cyfPhZujU4ahNF4FjZa1I0i6uwKTbBcH0HCoObeCOMD078EXjELrlSkoHrKDIvf_qBF2X_bXsW5Ndw7jHmH5YYUmnI1h0txegYG9SGacnumxt6aRjxwsecDZmqY028-eCB3L8QctIrr-O4xlbanLqTeiZJ85zdCQVfLm5DHrR843VMEIFx1MIkY7QHatvgvmiqY4sxDGWFnWm3RiThTsN5DFNY1XMs8%3D) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7b113ad3e05a4d30904f15fd199646c2&_e=v04Sj4_e_xCSWqLuAqNLebmX10JPGaVJFAPQmHfOUMTljH7CfvNa0ftVJpD2T4CdHtEx6tcGZmZ9cyfPhZujU4ahNF4FjZa1I0i6uwKTbBcH0HCoObeCOMD078EXjELrwDaAdGGvy3asA1bimiW8EZstxon7lq0RjjqMKOYUSVvMTq_oTM0xw_2oyc7j9xmokCebKX0bl11W11Rd-szuaP6qRFLEUer1J_-2Rs1Vdhw2C7kZBkaEAWd0KG58wET7jgJkXVi-c_LSP0sGfREEc6ws5UcPlIj1APLSo3Uovh8%3D "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7b113ad3e05a4d30904f15fd199646c2&_e=v04Sj4_e_xCSWqLuAqNLebmX10JPGaVJFAPQmHfOUMTljH7CfvNa0ftVJpD2T4CdHtEx6tcGZmZ9cyfPhZujU4ahNF4FjZa1I0i6uwKTbBcH0HCoObeCOMD078EXjELrKInUDOqSrbSyZPiu0wuJytCU5dBxSTfmnvP0tAOZCqLlC5loMPoe7Hqcb7Q949-a-OfIPCvWlIMRc5r5CPYzCQGhPfwcv89h2y5ehlHtEZKfpW-2D7lwNf2-rTuu4cq3i0VWx4oHzieve5lefjOeWkuLZ_jqVHMnfnBJ9abC4nw%3D) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.

clean_body: I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER! | | | | | | | Friend, | Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER! | "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY " | That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise! But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them... And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation. This town is broken, fellow patriot. And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that LOUD AND CLEAR by clicking the button below! | "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!" | Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you. | "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP." | Thanks for fighting with me, | | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | | | | | | | | "SUPPORT TEAM GAETZ IN 2023!" | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. body:
| | | Peter, As we begin the New Year, I want to personally thank you for your incredible support that’s gotten us here.

In 2022, we took back the House and united millions of Americans against the socialist Democrats that are killing our country from the inside out. Now that we have _real_ leaders and a record number of Veterans in Congress, it’s time for us to get to work.

Peter, taking back the House was just the beginning. Our fight is far from over, and the Democrats are prepared to push back even harder this year, but I know our grassroots team is up for the challenge.

[**I believe in this A-team. name: Andy Biggs
subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
We won’t get it with RINOs
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbfc34c06000446381a27e2b1bb21fa2&_e=I9Y4AxknZIKn0RQYix2_aV-BReLq3bHHcnk6N2F_13NX479VPR781MgpokWQQkziOMA8QGQLtkcJ9g1BPP6U6eTAt7-82Rfrev_YZBREq_2VYz9wmQJ8Lt0dZo6EAupzroEVKzt2YSVvSN05UShzw_BEvOpIvs1z3ycucphCPRVFkJOxD1CTM99rY31r2dV4GE5IGFyqbiIMKhsW5223mNikI4L7OqzpR-0bNy_mskqEz7H3TKBfkkQCldK5spaZNnyDE0FwAEfI8Wr7WnMtJzN1IvQm8koIt9f9lrdKJ_tJhDHnTTSj-qXkdIVtI9HJ)
---
| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That's why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbfc34c06000446381a27e2b1bb21fa2&_e=I9Y4AxknZIKn0RQYix2_aV-BReLq3bHHcnk6N2F_13NX479VPR781MgpokWQQkziOMA8QGQLtkcJ9g1BPP6U6eTAt7-82Rfrev_YZBREq_2VYz9wmQJ8Lt0dZo6EAupzroEVKzt2YSVvSN05UShzw_BEvOpIvs1z3ycucphCPRUIfNuhF0s8PnfXlCHXK1qEhiHTBOBL0wn-7m7S7on5BVavPcUKq9pNVUc0NmH09uGneX3CuZ8NZHcOIRIS_7F-ZQd44RM2-gkeB_kp6KE1VECEFs_AyOfvartAfoSvRc8-IoeHLZggnwtEs0Mxx_7Q)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbfc34c06000446381a27e2b1bb21fa2&_e=I9Y4AxknZIKn0RQYix2_aV-BReLq3bHHcnk6N2F_13NX479VPR781MgpokWQQkziOMA8QGQLtkcJ9g1BPP6U6eTAt7-82Rfrev_YZBREq_2VYz9wmQJ8Lt0dZo6EAupzroEVKzt2YSVvSN05UShzw_BEvOpIvs1z3ycucphCPRXHO-6KbAbUAteuU1-VgEz5UrLaBLlC1xBs2SDCFEMo4keqFIAqrI0Jhqouk7hYMjq3Z6Eve9q3SVvIj8REMIBSaOGpCPThee1ssvrmlossldqXSKiUd_9tIfZi8_FrYf87hcfDnN40PxLwoWvFHjV0)
---
I'm up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I'm the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I've been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won 't allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won't let Joe Biden and his handler's radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won't rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbfc34c06000446381a27e2b1bb21fa2&_e=I9Y4AxknZIKn0RQYix2_aV-BReLq3bHHcnk6N2F_13NX479VPR781MgpokWQQkziOMA8QGQLtkcJ9g1BPP6U6eTAt7-82Rfrev_YZBREq_2VYz9wmQJ8Lt0dZo6EAupzroEVKzt2YSVvSN05UShzw_BEvOpIvs1z3ycucphCPRXeGyqyCBjnhS1glbLXKWQHkulrfVZFb2Xc6AkjcSuQQzBbOyboplukZ4YVbBmQM98JCSEH3z95uaCLSAMvOqd1DS7dX9T_RGaSRAfj5kdASIdbUgwJ-_RHkzju0YMoQGxMyodlaiZ4s4qSqJZpFXhZ)**

You're a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

Kari Lake Here, and I want to tell you we can repair this now.

We don't have to hand over rigged elections to our children and grandchildren.

We can save Arizona and America.

We don't save it by installing illegitimate leaders. Or surrendering ourselves to the establishment.

The evidence is there -- it's only a matter of time before the truth is brought to light.

There's still time to step up, and this might be your biggest opportunity yet.

clean_body: | Kari Lake Here, and I want to tell you we can repair this now. We don't have to hand over rigged elections to our children and grandchildren. We can save Arizona and America. We don't save it by installing illegitimate leaders. Or surrendering ourselves to the establishment. The evidence is there -- it's only a matter of time before the truth is brought to light. There's still time to step up, and this might be your biggest opportunity yet. | Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have nearly a dozen special elections in the next two months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Larry Hogan
subject: This is getting out of hand

body:
| | | [**_A Personal Note from Governor Larry Hogan_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=7233b407256543299c9662a4c874ad48&_e=eiYBM0GUVaaxsios8E4Wzvl7pWQAImN2m7CwLFrj5371SifIQEvuM6xbWsR5r5TcIOcqVzhN6ttl2um_looLzqVJlg32aEvXEYH-_SWIhX2IYkqySUDq6hV1CtFJYilaUH1EnXkbQYPgq-n1XaL5EyO9XnC9I1mwBfyhj21oaEkfKmLQ7qkedUolG29LZ2374rZftqre7IHpWMXGnThxRW-6Uzb6mihBUWl1j8HKRfPqkwXh2ABhZQLBOa_rjU60)
---
|
---
Fellow American... The dysfunction and division in Washington continues. Political actors seeking power are causing chaos in the House of Representatives. _**It's obvious that the divide in our party isn't about policy or political ideology.**_ _It's about those who want common sense, conservative solutions and those who want to be a performance act at the circus._ Rather than getting things done for the American people, the new Republican majority in Congress is caught in the midst of historic embarrassment. But this isn't hard. If we can achieve successes and historic wins here in deep-blue Maryland, it can be done anywhere. We achieved historic tax cuts, re-funded the police, turned a record deficit into a record surplus, and much more by putting _people over politics_. Our country needs leaders who buck performative politics, thrive on building bridges, and take pride in finding real solutions. Help _**An America United**_ and I support unity, not division as we continue to grow this national movement. **Please consider investing[ _$20, $55, $75, $100_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=7233b407256543299c9662a4c874ad48&_e=eiYBM0GUVaaxsios8E4Wzvl7pWQAImN2m7CwLFrj5371SifIQEvuM6xbWsR5r5TcIOcqVzhN6ttl2um_looLzqVJlg32aEvXEYH-_SWIhX2td-7y-fW6IbWNczsAg_F-RMOKfT6-lLa94nVP8R8IYRIKcTDusPEvPssjEv1QUG9-ZAucVtanabn62JV_O7lqzqObIBd5gSKQPn0xLMMJuM4vA2iWCVEecnJoc7382ALvqPC6s76oi8uUDSslcKjH) or anything you can to help fund our national messaging, outreach, and rapid response operation here: [https://secure.anamericaunited.org/unity](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=7233b407256543299c9662a4c874ad48&_e=eiYBM0GUVaaxsios8E4Wzvl7pWQAImN2m7CwLFrj5371SifIQEvuM6xbWsR5r5TcIOcqVzhN6ttl2um_looLzqVJlg32aEvXEYH-_SWIhX3lBh_YQv7TvnbMRpLwmTZfTlJwPztrGTGDTxwQX3PrmDut1CT1oeFHDrkBcaakRvkb6R0XRdNsztSDuTz0JYmF-_AkuktukOfo5teAigS9HE0YqhjDJhHYjGc8MDeNaYwhGq-I1QBWuaDYgvac4Czs)

Please consider investing or anything you can to help fund our national messaging, outreach, and rapid response operation here: Thank you, Governor Larry Hogan | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | for by An America United | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | |

subject: shocking defeat
