body:
I can hardly believe my eyes

| Peter,

I can hardly believe my eyes – I just watched House Republicans plunge into utter chaos on the House floor.

Extreme MAGA Republicans failed to vote for a Speaker of the House for the first time in decades.

Let me repeat that: Kevin McCarthy’s own Republicans just rejected him – proving House Republicans are fighting themselves instead of fighting for the people.

**This changes everything for Democrats. We now have a huge opportunity to step in and show what we can do – _but only if we move quickly to prove our numbers._**

[_**So I need my own massive show of support right now to prove that, while Republicans are in complete disarray, Democrats stand united and ready to take the reins. If I can gather 1,000 gifts before midnight, we’ll have a historic fundraising day and show that Democrats are ready to take back the House. name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: Allow me to introduce you to PA’s Junior (and very cute) Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
One Fetterman wore shorts to João’s swearing-in...
#
Hi Derek, it’s Gisele.
I wanted to take a moment to celebrate João’s swearing-in with the people who’ve been reading our emails + supporting us this whole time. Because YOU helped build the clean, honest, and victorious campaign that got us to this point.
So without further ado...**allow me to introduce you to PA’s Junior (and very cute) Senator! 💙💙**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-good-luck-card-email?source=em20230105-8196&t=1&akid=8196%2E434096%2ERh6Ecm)
_For a guy who hates suits, he sure wears it well._ 😍
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-good-luck-card-email?source=em20230105-8196&t=2&akid=8196%2E434096%2ERh6Ecm)
_Yes, there was a Fetterman in shorts at the swearing-in...but at least it wasn’t John._ 😂
**Seriously, I just couldn’t be more proud of João, Derek.****[That’s why I was wondering if you could add your name to his good-luck card? I know it will mean a lot to see how many people are wishing him well. Add your name now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-good-luck-card-email?source=em20230105-8196&t=3&akid=8196%2E434096%2ERh6Ecm)**
**[Sign the Card »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-good-luck-card-email?source=em20230105-8196&t=4&akid=8196%2E434096%2ERh6Ecm)**
Thank you for making all of this possible, Derek.
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230105-8196-footer&t=5&refcode2=8196_434096_Rh6Ecm&akid=8196%2E434096%2ERh6Ecm)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Hakeem Jeffries needs our help to step up and show the country what stable leadership in a crisis looks like.
body:
Looking for 321 supporters
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T560781fb-fc2f-480a-afee-5bb70ed49802/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[_Will you join Blue Amp Action in helping Leader Jeffries reach his goal of 321 new donations by midnight, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford, today?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb726015-106e-4bf1-9d33-e934d94329f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _Democrat Hakeem Jeffries, unanimously elected Leader by the House Democratic Caucus on every ballot (seven and counting!) while Kevin McCarthy has failed the same test seven times, just offered an unsparing criticism of Republicans, saying:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te10510b6-15b2-4925-9f6e-264f1bc03ec8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
He couldn't be more correct. “Republicans are incapable of governing.” _THIS IS THE MOMENT to show Americans that while the toddlers squabble, we're the adults they need to lead_.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2263133-3292-490d-bcf3-df513c6ce832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Jeffries also shared that "I still need 321 more donations to show that Democrats are united and ready to lead the country."_** **[_Will you join Blue Amp Action in helping Leader Jeffries reach his goal by making these 321 donations, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford, today?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf8f97d2-40ef-4939-ba43-10fb6a5643c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _This is an important moment for us to step forward and be clear about who must lead this country. If we can get these donations in by 11:59 pm tonight, Jeffries hits his goal, and we'll send our message loud & clear. _ THANK YOU! Cliff
---
| | |

|
---

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te46587bd-1a73-40f6-8bf2-eba475a4a774/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** – As Joe Biden prepares to make his first-ever trip to the southern border that he deliberately erased, President Trump announced that when he is president again, it will be the official policy of the United States to take down the drug cartels just as we took down ISIS.

[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtugzAQ_Bq4GdnGGDhwaIpyaKRUqaq2N-QXwcEYZEyj5OtraFppZckzs7szqypEc1xmsCQkllWGWwRjXWGIU4hghmGaEZSUqM1hWlLOM5EjSiICpZr7sZWjZUZevFuGKRHjEHdVQSVlbcp5QUsqCKcCyZKWhAkJmeAwNlXn_TRH6VOE96FCLzdq7Q6fb0zgrV_A5NSspbIe_K4AlwRsW4BUwrDAgitzYLRAMOeVmZPODyZK94sfmkFJvQxRWquBadN0bYTpis_j4oQKuBWmwVlj2YMQbJiYPttA_SUP5Frzv2S0PtgJitWQV42Ybm5u8gKhoGis0TJwl9Pete8nXsgN7LQMOev6_vbS9ffjLnaVnK7aGD3TPBzxvPrb7hYMGN3eqijfRRhvfRhvJ8IHsvs60sPnoQav7KMHNc3IdWXxc3j9bVL_0seUZMu9onn9A6HKmHA)
[Watch the video announcement](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtugzAQ_Bq4GdmLbcKBQ1MSVY2USj20vSFjm-DEPAomEfn6GtpGWlnyzOzuzOqM8ARShlNKQ5UxqAgOTQYYYkwwAxwzSqKUVAmOU16WTCaE04BipcdLV6muFVad3TA1fSS7JqwzRXmKU0I0AEurshIbKClIKDXjkhIW2qx2rh-D-CmAvS_fW1q9dPvPFSieLxPqBz0apVuHflegc4TWLUhpaYVn0U0MqGuRFIPTdoxq19gg3k-uKRqtzNQEca4bYWxRVwHwBR-7aZDa4620BbCiFX-EFE0vzKn11H9yTy41PiRd67wdr1gMOV3Ifh7GItkQ4hVFa43y3HGedtfye9q9rGBtlM-Z5_f31_pyP27DIVP9zVhrRp74I54Wf-vdvAFrqjkLkm0AsPYBrCeCA91-Hfnh85CjN_FxQTln9Law8OxfN_f6If2bEq25FzTJfwCl8Jf6)

“The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it's now time for America to wage war on the cartels,” President Trump said. “The drug cartels and their allies in the Biden administration have the blood of countless millions on their hands. Millions and millions of families and people are being destroyed. When I am back in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again.”

_**President Donald J. Trump’s Plan to Destroy the Drug Cartels** _
_“The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it’s now time for America to wage war on the cartels.” – Donald J. Trump_
**President Trump laid out an aggressive plan to dismantle the criminal trafficking networks that are destroying lives and communities on both sides of the border.**

**TRUMP ACTION PLAN TO DESTROY THE DRUG CARTELS:**
* Restore all Trump border policies and fully secure border
* Deploy all necessary military assets, including the U.S. Navy, to impose a full naval embargo on the cartels, to ensure they cannot use our region’s waters to traffic illicit drugs to the U.S.
* Order the Department of Defense to make appropriate use of special forces, cyber warfare, and other covert and overt actions to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership, infrastructure, and operations
* Designate the major drug cartels as foreign terrorist organizations

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL – As Joe Biden prepares to make his first-ever trip to the southern border that he deliberately erased, President Trump announced that when he is president again, it will be the official policy of the United States to take down the drug cartels just as we took down ISIS. “The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it's now time for America to wage war on the cartels,” President Trump said. “The drug cartels and their allies in the Biden administration have the blood of countless millions on their hands. Millions and millions of families and people are being destroyed. When I am back in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again.” President Donald J. Trump’s Plan to Destroy the Drug Cartels “The drug cartels are waging war on America—and it’s now time for America to wage war on the cartels.” – Donald J. Trump President Trump laid out an aggressive plan to dismantle the criminal trafficking networks that are destroying lives and communities on both sides of the border. TRUMP ACTION PLAN TO DESTROY THE DRUG CARTELS: Restore all Trump border policies and fully secure border Deploy all necessary military assets, including the U.S. Navy, to impose a full naval embargo on the cartels, to ensure they cannot use our region’s waters to traffic illicit drugs to the U.S. Order the Department of Defense to make appropriate use of special forces, cyber warfare, and other covert and overt actions to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership, infrastructure, and operations Designate the major drug cartels as foreign terrorist organizations Cut off the cartels’ access to the global financial system Get full cooperation of neighboring governments to dismantle the cartels, or else fully expose the bribes and corruption that protect these criminal networks Ask Congress to ensure drug smugglers and traffickers can receive the Death Penalty BIDEN’S DEADLY DESTRUCTION OF OUR BORDER: Joe Biden has spent the last two years dismantling the southern border. Biden’s Open Borders policies are killing innocent Americans , ravaging American communities, enriching the cartels, and destabilizing large parts of Mexico and Latin America . Since Joe Biden took office, an estimated 200,000+ Americans have died from drug overdoses. Hundreds of thousands of pounds of ultra-lethal fentanyl, heroin, meth, cocaine, and other illicit narcotics are pouring across our wide-open border and into American communities. Federal officials that they only seize up to 10% of these drugs. Enough fentanyl was at the border last year to kill every single American. Biden inherited the strongest border in U.S. history, and turned it into the greatest border disaster in the history of the world. Biden stopped wall construction, gutted Remain in Mexico, ripped up asylum cooperation agreements, imposed catch-and-release across the entire southern border, slandered and attacked border agents, announced the cancelation of Title 42, and effectively abolished interior enforcement. Drug cartels and human smugglers have seen their revenue skyrocket by an estimated 2,500%, netting $13 billion this year. Trafficking illegal alien migrants is now a major source of revenue for the drug cartels. Fueled in major part by Biden’s border disaster, the number of Americans killed due to fentanyl by 94% since 2019, and fentanyl poisoning has become the leading cause of death for Americans between the ages of 18 and 45. BIDEN’S PRO-CARTEL BORDER POLICIES ARE ALSO DEVESTATING MEXICO: of torture in Mexico have doubled, and reports of violence by criminal groups against authorities or large crowds rose 756% in the first half of 2022 compared to the previous year. In Mexico, over 100,000 civilians are missing or murdered at the hands of the cartels, with an of 25 Mexican citizens disappearing every day. Cartels destabilized Mexico by bribing officials at all levels of government, assassinating journalists and public servants, and mass political candidates. Biden’s actions are pushing vulnerable migrant women and children into the arms of the most vicious, violent, and predatory criminal networks on earth. Arrests for human smuggling by 82% since 2014, and an estimated 60% of unaccompanied Latin American children who attempt to cross the border are by cartels and abused in child pornography or drug trafficking. BOTTOM LINE:Biden has destroyed the border—President Trump will destroy the cartels. ** | ---|--- Donald J. | Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That’s why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=118985e270714e7cb00c5907652adf27&_e=3swbC6jHotlio9I6ubwCXKmKv5Txxly0Q34bfDSX11tz1UEJt9fwNUMBNxk3FiH9rGbihQC7NCNlmw_QRjvFhjsxAolb4Ho3QEvLuByfm1FCzg8DxZ0xEh2oIdbNVoc4RefjV_RpgxJrMeJvEQbhfKgRFhih5cyMeDhwivol3QdfX3L3-Z9ep_5BEeyOtztZS0ChUPqBvj8JhTV_r3jl4gg4NIrmphY9IQrPY6Hc2LC9Fxx2vwHXW9ylAncjs73ooA3Ro9nq9BdRaazda4b6BwOpjEt-tQv2fLr3WiSlCPcPsf8Ns6Ve0USlxx6m5-zuHPHia73Kt6RrH23gtbgtQE5EbkYOX3niQpmJvsN2gID9wabwhZzc5Oaf9SC9gkTbAVjhyJQq_jcu5-gPcxy4pw%3D%3D)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=118985e270714e7cb00c5907652adf27&_e=3swbC6jHotlio9I6ubwCXKmKv5Txxly0Q34bfDSX11tz1UEJt9fwNUMBNxk3FiH9rGbihQC7NCNlmw_QRjvFhjsxAolb4Ho3QEvLuByfm1FCzg8DxZ0xEh2oIdbNVoc4RefjV_RpgxJrMeJvEQbhfKgRFhih5cyMeDhwivol3QdfX3L3-Z9ep_5BEeyOtztZS0ChUPqBvj8JhTV_r3jl4gg4NIrmphY9IQrPY6Hc2LC9Fxx2vwHXW9ylAncjs73oL9-takIGof6qgr5XMsM9ao1LxlfLQsYKb5hUSgCrYOukaaRQUgtI6828jN8HfF5xxJxuKpjzEsOZV5S8jOQnzV2FAXCwW4B2pRB_FUm4hWsFf-muqt08Fk1mIFgljq-LNQNBie_gC-4aP_dFcEv86g%3D%3D)
---
I’m up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I’m the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I’ve been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won’t allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won’t let Joe Biden and his handler’s radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won’t rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=118985e270714e7cb00c5907652adf27&_e=3swbC6jHotlio9I6ubwCXKmKv5Txxly0Q34bfDSX11tz1UEJt9fwNUMBNxk3FiH9rGbihQC7NCNlmw_QRjvFhjsxAolb4Ho3QEvLuByfm1FCzg8DxZ0xEh2oIdbNVoc4RefjV_RpgxJrMeJvEQbhfKgRFhih5cyMeDhwivol3QdfX3L3-Z9ep_5BEeyOtztZS0ChUPqBvj8JhTV_r3jl4gg4NIrmphY9IQrPY6Hc2LC9Fxx2vwHXW9ylAncjs73oe5tVNZTMxq5YmkbRt2XdjgdYE5VGRCMj0VPkL889h01cp9suIrr1wIEaWQNPp0jEduElTWf1K0Isll3UcgFzfzOlonggVgGnevTjrPDwMt_ZwV23LjH18mPRH5njhcKKa2v7XUwZYtjoFPzzAJWJHg%3D%3D)**

You’re a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=118985e270714e7cb00c5907652adf27&_e=3swbC6jHotlio9I6ubwCXKmKv5Txxly0Q34bfDSX11tz1UEJt9fwNUMBNxk3FiH9rGbihQC7NCNlmw_QRjvFhjsxAolb4Ho3QEvLuByfm1FCzg8DxZ0xEh2oIdbNVoc4RefjV_RpgxJrMeJvEQbhfKgRFhih5cyMeDhwivol3QdfX3L3-Z9ep_5BEeyOtztZS0ChUPqBvj8JhTV_r3jl4gg4NIrmphY9IQrPY6Hc2LC9Fxx2vwHXW9ylAncjs73olXOPG3M2NegsaWVcSN1SBTBIlqB_xjvL5VyuV6PLB45Xp3XE1zE_vPvIyVi3wRxvDiF2LB6tJPSle_I8VVnXRvjqffLp8Ta7CUU__weFxpTdfbsMbzzQhHnKbgBzDRD939SjUTU-B-DYvzBDFIlyEQ%3D%3D)

name: Team AOC
subject: How you can help relief efforts in Buffalo, NY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A devastating winter storm left 39 people dead and hundreds in need. Here’s how you can help:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230105-3764-header&t=1&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)
Few places were harder hit by the winter storm that swept the country in late December than Buffalo. Tragically, 39 people across Erie County have died, and hundreds went without power for nearly a week.
**We’re asking for you to join us in supporting two organizations working around the clock to provide emergency housing and relief services to displaced families and refugees across the city of Buffalo.**
[Will you step up today and make a $3 contribution to help Vive Shelters and Friends of the Night People as they provide relief to Buffalo residents who were most impacted by this deadly storm?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230105.4wrrXE&refcode=em20230105-3764-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)
**_100% of your contribution will directly benefit these two groups._**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230105.4wrrXE&refcode=em20230105-3764-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)**
**Vive Shelters** houses refugee claimants and asylum seekers wishing to apply for U.S. asylum. The shelter is currently functioning at full capacity, and is in desperate need of our grassroots support to provide medical services and case management during this emergency.
**Friends of the Night People** provides food, clothing, medical care, counseling, and more to the poor and homeless community in Buffalo. Your donation would help provide meals, hygiene products, and clothing to unhoused people affected by the storm.
[You can make a major difference right now by splitting a $3 contribution between these two organizations providing direct, on-the-ground relief. Can we count on your $3 contribution now?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230105.4wrrXE&refcode=em20230105-3764-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)
Our hearts are with those who lost loved ones to the storm, and all those affected.
Together, we will help this community make it out of this stronger.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230105?refcode=em20230105-3764-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=23&refcode2=3764_2526796_v5TzTr&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230105-3764-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=24&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3764%2E2526796%2Ev5TzTr)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Gosar Nominates Biggs for Speaker!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fights Back Against the Swamp! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/fights-back-against-the-swamp?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=63c899e942&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, For the last two years, I have listened to you and the message was clear: **NO MORE STATUS QUO SWAMP.** I heard you, and therefore I did not vote for Kevin McCarthy. I instead nominated my colleague and friend, Andy Biggs, a true conservative warrior. The conservatives reached a consensus on the second ballot and nominated another friend of mine, Jim Jordan. I backed Jim Jordan on the second and again on the third ballot. [_**If we want to change DC, we have to change our leadership**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b825b25524&e=645b3b1338). We can't just keep doing the same thing over and over again and expect a different result. But friend, I have some bad news. [_**While I am fighting the swamp, the swamp is fighting back. They want to take me out. Again**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5bac537551&e=645b3b1338). I need your support today. I still owe legal fees to the attorneys that helped me in court when the Radical Left sued me to keep me off the ballot. I used what little campaign money I had left to get reelected. Now I am in debt and need your help. I've fought for America First, and I've fought for the American people. **[Donate $25, $50, or even $100 today. clean_body: Fights Back Against the Swamp! | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, For the last two years, I have listened to you and the message was clear: NO MORE STATUS QUO SWAMP. I heard you, and therefore I did not vote for Kevin McCarthy. I instead nominated my colleague and friend, Andy Biggs, a true conservative warrior. The conservatives reached a consensus on the second ballot and nominated another friend of mine, Jim Jordan. I backed Jim Jordan on the second and again on the third ballot. . We can't just keep doing the same thing over and over again and expect a different result. But friend, I have some bad news. . I need your support today. I still owe legal fees to the attorneys that helped me in court when the Radical Left sued me to keep me off the ballot. I used what little campaign money I had left to get reelected. Now I am in debt and need your help. I've fought for America First, and I've fought for the American people. . I want to keep fighting for you. Stand with me today. Respectfully, Paul Gosar, D.D.S. | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56950424/386423500/262007493?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230105_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMTAwMzgyLTQ4OGQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cb8Eg7zUyv-YSgoXfVdBNmXjaXGMrAW8EqMNtPMPTFg=) Peter, Republicans have now failed 10 times to elect a Speaker of the House.

This hasn’t happened in over 100 years.

I’ll be blunt: Republicans are incapable of governing. And they’re putting politics over the American people.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Have you seen our new sticker?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, do you
support the Squad?

Show everyone that you’re a part of our movement with our limited-edition
‘Squad Up!’ sticker.

We’ll be sending a sticker to anyone who signs up to make a new monthly
recurring donation to help sustain our work of ushering in a slate of
diverse, working-class leaders to Congress in 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20230105-26916&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]Make a recurring contribution and get our limited-edition sticker.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20230105-26916&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]Get Your Sticker »

2024 might sound like it’s far away, but primary challenger campaigns need
to start early in order to scale and win and reach the voters who will
deliver victory. We just launched candidate recruitment.

Whether you stick it on your laptop, car, notebook or anywhere else, you
can show off that you’re a part of our Squad and a dedicated part of our
progressive movement to change the status quo.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20230105-26916&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]Make a monthly donation to help sustain our work and we’ll send you a
sticker in the mail to say thank you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123865?refcode=em20230105-26916&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]Get Your Sticker »

Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230105-26916-footer&t=1007&refcode2=26916_1203867_VFoVq0&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=26916%2E1203867%2EVFoVq0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | | Peter, Socialism is growing. The radical Left is coming into our communities. The Democrats are lurching further and further Left.

_And to them, Republicans are just a speed bump on their road to America’s destruction._

It’s time to stop going by the same old playbook, Peter.

Conservatives need to be**** bold, speak the truth, and _stop caving in -_**and that starts with my plan to RESCUE AMERICA.**

I put together a new ad to rally patriots around our vision for America, and I need EVERY conservative to stand with me. | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: **.

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I’m ready for critical action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Team,

It’s the third day of the House stalemate.

Kevin McCarthy’s bid for House Majority Speaker has been rejected TEN times. Representatives are unable to do their jobs until a decision has been made. One branch of the Congress is literally offline.

Right-wing extremists clearly prefer total chaos in the House over coming together for the American people. They don’t want to govern — they want gridlock.

But, we’ve been able to band together and pass broad, bipartisan legislation in Congress before.

From prioritizing infrastructure, standing by our veterans, and investing in police reform, our past Congress has been able to get work done in a bipartisan way, bill after bill.

I’m ready to sit down and get things done. There’s plenty we can come together on for the sake of our bipartisan future, including addressing the mental health crisis and the opioid epidemic. It’s time we prioritize critical change, and leave petulant disagreements behind.

As I said earlier today, they must not give into extremists and give away the store. We must have the ability to govern.

There is so much we can accomplish. We just need to work together despite the extremist influences in Congress. At the end of the day, we must keep fighting for bipartisan solutions. I’m confident we’ll get it done.

Disagreements are inevitable, it’s up to us to proceed constructively.

Thank you,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Mia Bonta
subject: Join us for Ballots & Brunch this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Hi Peter,
Happy New Year! This Saturday, January 7th, you can vote in-person for the California Democratic Party ADEMs Election – electing the future Assembly District Delegates.
I am supporting the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, a group of 14 candidates who I know will represent our AD-18 progressive values within the Democratic Party. To Get Out The Vote, the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate would like to invite you to their Ballots & Brunch Meet & Greet, only a few blocks away from the in-person voting location . Join them before or after voting to meet the candidates, get a bite to eat, and encourage others to vote!
Save your spot and RSVP for The Unity Slate Ballots & Brunch [http://rsvp.ad18unity.com]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/Ballots-Brunch3.jpg]
It’s extremely important that AD-18 Democrats show up and vote this Saturday! If you didn’t register to vote by mail, this will be one of your only opportunities to make your voice heard. With your help, we can elect the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, candidates who will steer the Democratic Party to create policy that centers working class people and fights for issues such as housing affordability, healthcare, and criminal justice reform.
Here’s the run-down on in-person voting:
When: January 7th, 10am-2pm
Where: 1831 Park Blvd, Oakland, CA 94602
Register online to receive a PIN to be able to fill out your ballot. [https://ademelections.com/register/person]
When voting, please vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate members in the order they appear on your ballot: Zac Bowling #1, Mayra Alvarado #5, Carlotta Brown #6, Victor Flores #7, Doug Bloch #8, Courtney Welch #9, Fay Eastman #10, Jada Taylor Folse #13, Renia Webb #14, Ivan Garcia #19, Rowena Brown #21, Alex Randolph #22, Seth Steward #23, and Kevin Jenkins #28.
Peter, bring your friends/family to vote and stop by Ballots & Brunch this Saturday [http://rsvp.ad18unity.com]
If you need another reason to support the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, check out their full endorsement list. They are supported by various community leaders, elected officials, and organizations – each dedicated to advancing equity in AD-18 in their own right.
The Progressive & Labor Unity Slate is endorsed by:
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
State Controller, Malia Cohen
Oakland Mayor Sheng Thao
Oakland Council President Nikki Fortunato Bas
Oakland Councilmember Dan Kalb
Alameda Mayor Marilyn Ashcraft
Emeryville Mayor John Bauters
Emeryville Councilmember Ally Medina
Emeryville Councilmember David Mourra
Igor Tregub, CPD Environmental Caucus Chair
SEIU-UHW (healthcare workers)
Alameda County Building and Construction Trades Council
Black Women Organized for Political Action
I hope to see you this Saturday – your vote will help determine the future of the Democratic Party.
In partnership,
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.com
https://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]

_“When it comes to Black candidates, we deal with so many challenges, whether it be voter suppression of our community to issues of gender and racism in terms of voters’ perceptions of Black candidates.”

Quentin James, Founder and President of The Collective PAC_
---
And for Black women, it’s even worse. Whether it’s the targeted attacks against their appearance or their “lack of experience,” Black women are constantly fighting and overcoming unprecedented challenges. But still, Black women are more likely to receive _less donations_ than their white counterparts. **_(Want to take a guess why that is?)_**

Peter, our biggest takeaway from 2022 is that our Black candidates DEPEND on grassroots donations from supporters like you.

[Here at The Collective PAC, we know Black candidates CAN win — but only if we back them with everything we have. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Our answer? “When it comes to Black candidates, we deal with so many challenges, whether it be voter suppression of our community to issues of gender and racism in terms of voters’ perceptions of Black candidates.” Quentin James, Founder and President of The Collective PAC And for Black women, it’s even worse. Whether it’s the targeted attacks against their appearance or their “lack of experience,” Black women are constantly fighting and overcoming unprecedented challenges. But still, Black women are more likely to receive less donations than their white counterparts. (Want to take a guess why that is?) Peter, our biggest takeaway from 2022 is that our Black candidates DEPEND on grassroots donations from supporters like you. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We have a plan to help Black candidates win — and it’s working. In the 2022 midterms, we helped elect over 100 Black leaders to political office across the country. But, Peter, we’ve also seen what happens when our candidates don’t receive the funds or the attention they need to win. So, our goal for 2024? Start early. Stay engaged. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | –The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
Big tech has been allowed to censor conservatives for FAR TOO LONG.

I don’t know about you, but **I’m sick of hearing the liberal Fake News media say whatever they want to, while conservatives are silenced, simply for having a different opinion.**

I’m vowing to step up and investigate these Big tech abuses ASAP, **but I need your help NOW.**

Will you stand with me and fight against Big tech and the radical Left? clean_body: We need to strategize now.| | | | | Let's talk, . It was a crazy mid-term election – I think we can all agree on that. Because of your hard work, our party took control of the House, and we'll soon have a new speaker. (Bye, Pelosi. 👋🏻) I would like to know what issues you feel are most pressing so I can best understand how I can serve and represent the people of Minnesota under new leadership. Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Senator Stabenow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20230105 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20230105]
Team,
I wanted to take a moment to honor our state’s senior U.S. Senator, Debbie Stabenow.
This morning, Senator Stabenow announced that she won’t be seeking re-election in 2024 . And when I spoke with her not long after, I thanked her for everything she’s done for Michigan — for our farmers, our manufacturers, our children, our families.
For almost 50 years, she has worked tirelessly to serve Michigan. She literally never seems to run out of energy, and has a passion for Michigan that oozes out of her.
I also thanked her for all she has done for me personally — for being a friend, confidant, and invaluable sounding board.
Since 2019, I have been lucky to represent her old seat from when she served in Congress. So her influence, both direct and indirect, on policy and politics in mid-Michigan can’t be overstated.
As the first woman elected to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate, her retirement announcement provides us all an opportunity to reflect on her trailblazing impact.
Over the next days and weeks, there will be much discussion about what comes next for Michigan, but for now, my thanks goes to Senator Stabenow for being a true public servant tirelessly fighting for Michigan.
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.
